AcceptEncoding
Represents an HTTP Accept-Encoding header.

AcceptRanges
Represents a parsed Accept-Range HTTP response header.

AccessibleInfo
Abstract base class for reflection info classes that wrap AccessibleObject.
Adaptation
The result of a ReactiveStreamsAdapter.adapt(...) call: either a single-value CompletionStage or a multi-value Flow.Publisher.
AddOp
The JSON Patch "add" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.1.
Address
DTO for an HTML <address> element.
AdminMixin
Mixin that serves operational-introspection endpoints under /admin/*: thread dump, heap statistics, configurable cache-flush hooks, and rate-limit-bucket inspection.
AdminMixin.Builder
Builder for AdminMixin instances.
AdminProvider
Flavor-neutral operational-introspection worker bean shared by the admin @Rest flavors.
AdminProvider.Builder
Builder for AdminProvider instances.
AdminResource
Child-resource flavor of the AdminMixin mixin.
AdminServlet
Standalone servlet companion of the AdminMixin mixin.

Represents a parsed Age HTTP response header.

AnnotationInfo<T extends Annotation>

AnnotationObject.Builder

AnnotationProvider

AnnotationProvider.Builder

AnnotationWork

AnnotationWorkList

ApiKeyAuthFilter
AuthFilter that authenticates requests via a raw API-key string.

ApiKeyAuthFilter.Source
Source of the API-key string.
ApiKeyGuard
AuthN RestGuard that authenticates requests via a raw API-key string.
ApiKeyGuard.Builder
Builder class.
ApiKeyGuard.Source
Source of the API-key string.
ApiKeyStore
SPI for resolving a raw API key string to its associated Principal.
App
Petstore Jetty/Microservice deployment entry point.
App
Petstore Spring Boot deployment entry point.
App
Entry-point class.
App.AppConfig
Application-specific configuration class contributing the top-level REST servlet.
App.AppConfig
Application-specific configuration class contributing the LoadConfigResource servlet.
AppliedAnnotationObject
An implementation of an annotation that can be dynamically applied to classes, methods, fields, and constructors at runtime.
AppliedAnnotationObject.Builder
Builder for AppliedAnnotationObject objects.
AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderC
Builder for applied annotations targeting constructors.
AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderM
Builder for applied annotations targeting methods.
AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderMF
Builder for applied annotations targeting methods and fields.
AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderT
Builder for applied annotations targeting classes.
AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderTM
Builder for applied annotations targeting classes and methods.
AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderTMF
Builder for applied annotations targeting classes, methods, and fields.
AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderTMFC
Builder for applied annotations targeting classes, methods, fields, and constructors.
AppliedOnClassAnnotationObject
An implementation of an annotation that can be dynamically applied to classes, methods, fields, and constructors, with additional support for type-safe class targeting via the AppliedOnClassAnnotationObject.onClass() property.
Area
DTO for an HTML <area> element.
ArgException
General exception due to a malformed Java parameter.
Args
Lean parser for command-line arguments passed in through a main(String[] args) method.
Args.Builder
Builder for Args with configurable grammar hooks.
ArgsPropertySource
Property source backed by Args.
ArgsPropertySourceProvider
Provider for ArgsPropertySource.
ArgsVar
JVM args variable resolver.
ArithmeticFunctions
Arithmetic functions for the #{...} script catalog.
ArithmeticFunctions.Abs
#{abs(a)} — returns the absolute value of a.
ArithmeticFunctions.Add
#{add(a, b)} — returns a + b.
ArithmeticFunctions.Divide
#{divide(a, b)} — returns a / b.
ArithmeticFunctions.Max
#{max(a, b)} — returns the larger of two numbers.
ArithmeticFunctions.Min
#{min(a, b)} — returns the smaller of two numbers.
ArithmeticFunctions.Modulo
#{modulo(a, b)} — returns a % b.
ArithmeticFunctions.Multiply
#{multiply(a, b)} — returns a * b.
ArithmeticFunctions.Subtract
#{subtract(a, b)} — returns a - b.
ArrayAssertion<E>
Used for assertion calls against arrays.
ArrayRecordReadable
Capability role for parsers that can stream the elements of a top-level wire array, yielding each element as a separate record.
ArrayRecordWritable
Capability role for serializers that can emit each element of a top-level wire array as a separate record.
Article
DTO for an HTML <article> element.
AsciiMap
Stores a Map of ASCII characters to Strings in a quick-lookup array.
AsciiSet
Stores a set of ASCII characters for quick lookup.
AsciiSet.Builder
Builder class.
Aside
DTO for an HTML <aside> element.
AsideFloat
Identifies possible float values for HtmlDocSerializer.Builder.asideFloat(AsideFloat).
Assertion
Base class for all assertion objects.
AssertionPredicate<T>
Wrapper around a Predicate that allows for an error message for when the predicate fails.
AssertionPredicate.And<T>
Encapsulates multiple predicates into a single AND operation.
AssertionPredicate.Not<T>
Negates an assertion.
AssertionPredicate.Or<T>
Encapsulates multiple predicates into a single OR operation.
AssertionPredicates
Predefined AssertionPredicate objects.
Assertions
Main class for creation of assertions for stand-alone testing.
AssertionUtils
Utility methods for argument validation and assertion.
AsyncResponseProcessor
Response processor that unwraps CompletableFuture / CompletionStage return values from @RestOp-annotated methods and bridges them to the servlet container's asynchronous request lifecycle.
AtomBuilder
Various useful static methods for creating ATOM elements.
AtomFeed
Atom feed example.
AtomHtmlExample
Atom feed HTML example.
AtomJsonExample
Atom feed JSON example.
AtomXmlExample
Atom feed XML example.
Attr
REST request attribute annotation.
AttributeArg
Resolves method parameters and parameter types annotated with Attr on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
Audio
DTO for an HTML <audio> element.
Auth
Marks a @RestOp-method parameter as the authenticated Principal for the current request.
AuthArg
Resolves @RestOp-method parameters that represent the authenticated Principal.
AuthenticatedRequestWrapper
An HttpServletRequestWrapper that surfaces the filter-resolved Principal and aggregated roles via the standard servlet API surface.
AuthenticationException
Specialization of Unauthorized thrown by BearerTokenGuard, ApiKeyGuard, and user-supplied TokenValidator / ApiKeyStore implementations to signal AuthN failure.
Authenticator
Lowest-level authentication contract shared by the servlet-filter layer (AuthFilter, AuthFilterChain) and the resource layer (RestAuthenticator).
AuthFilter
Abstract base class for Juneau authentication servlet filters.
AuthFilterChain
Orchestrates multiple AuthFilter instances with first-success principal resolution, role aggregation, and all-failure aggregation semantics.
AuthFilterChain.Builder
Builder class.
Authorization
Represents a parsed Authorization HTTP request header.
Authorization
Represents an HTTP Authorization header.
Authorization.Builder
Fluent builder for assembling an HTTP Authorization credentials value.
AuthResult
Immutable value type returned by Authenticator.authenticate(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest) on success.
AuthResult.MergeMode
Controls how an AuthResult merges with results accumulated earlier in an authenticator chain.
AuthResultAccumulator
Mutable helper that folds a sequence of AuthResults into a single result, honoring AuthResult.MergeMode.
AutoListSwap<T>
A dynamic object swap based on reflection of a Java class that converts objects to Lists.
AutoMapSwap<T>
A dynamic object swap based on reflection of a Java class that converts Objects to serializable Maps.
AutoNumberSwap<T>
A dynamic object swap based on reflection of a Java class that converts Objects to Number serializable objects.
AutoObjectSwap<T>
A dynamic object swap based on reflection of a Java class that converts Objects to serializable objects.
AutoStringSwap<T>
A dynamic string swap that serializes objects via Object.toString() and deserializes via fromString(String), valueOf(String), or a single-String-argument constructor.
B
DTO for an HTML <b> element.
BadGateway
Represents an HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error response.
BadRequest
Exception representing an HTTP 400 (Bad Request).
BadRequest
Represents an HTTP 400 Bad Request error response.
Base
DTO for an HTML <base> element.
BaseHttpPartParser
Base class for implementations of HttpPartParser
BaseHttpPartParser.Builder<SELF extends BaseHttpPartParser.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
BaseHttpPartParserSession
Base class for implementations of HttpPartParserSession
BaseHttpPartSerializer
Base class for implementations of HttpPartSerializer
BaseHttpPartSerializer.Builder<SELF extends BaseHttpPartSerializer.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
BaseHttpPartSerializerSession
Base class for implementations of HttpPartSerializerSession
BasicActuatorGroup
Convenience assembly of the Actuator-style management surface under a single configurable path prefix.
BasicAssertionError
An extension of AssertionError with helper constructors for messages with message-style arguments.
BasicBeanConverter
Default implementation of BeanConverter for Bean-Centric Test (BCT) object conversion.
BasicBeanConverter.Builder
Builder for creating customized BasicBeanConverter instances.
BasicBeanDefMapper
Simple implementation of the MarshallingDefMapper interface.
BasicBeanStore
Basic implementation of WritableBeanStore.
BasicBooleanHeader
Category of headers that consist of a single boolean value.
BasicBooleanPart
A NameValuePair that consists of a single boolean value.
BasicCallLogger
Basic implementation of a call logger.
BasicConverter
A concrete CachingConverter that supports common type conversions without requiring a MarshallingContext or MarshallingSession.
BasicCsvArrayPart
A NameValuePair that consists of a comma-delimited list of string values.
BasicCsvHeader
Category of headers that consist of a comma-delimited list of string values.
BasicDateHeader
Category of headers that consist of a single HTTP-date.
BasicDatePart
A NameValuePair that consist of a single HTTP-date.
BasicDebugEnablement
Default implementation of the DebugEnablement interface.
BasicDisabledCallLogger
Default implementation of a CallLogger that never logs REST calls.
BasicEntityTagHeader
Category of headers that consist of a single entity validator value.
BasicEntityTagsHeader
Category of headers that consist of a comma-delimited list of entity validator values.
BasicFileFinder
Basic implementation of a FileFinder.
BasicHeader
Superclass of all headers defined in this package.
BasicHeaderIterator
Basic implementation of a HeaderIterator.
BasicHtmlDocTemplate
A basic template for the HTML doc serializer.
BasicHttpEntity
A basic HttpEntity implementation with additional features.
BasicHttpException
Basic implementation of the HttpResponse interface for error responses.
BasicHttpException
Base class for HTTP error response exceptions (4xx and 5xx) in the org.apache.juneau.http stack.
BasicHttpResponse
Basic implementation of the HttpResponse interface.
BasicHttpResponse
Base class for concrete HTTP response objects in the org.apache.juneau.http stack.
BasicIntegerHeader
Category of headers that consist of a single integer value.
BasicIntegerPart
A NameValuePair that consists of a single integer value.
BasicJettyServerFactory
Basic implementation of a Jetty server factory.
BasicJson5Config
Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports JSON 5 transport.
BasicJsonConfig
Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports JSON transport.
BasicJsonHtmlConfig
Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports JSON and HTML transport.
BasicLongHeader
Category of headers that consist of a single long value.
BasicLongPart
A NameValuePair that consists of a single long value.
BasicMediaRangesHeader
Category of headers that consist of multiple parameterized string values.
BasicMediaTypeHeader
Category of headers that consist of a single parameterized string value.
BasicMicroserviceListener
Basic extensible microservice listener with default no-op method implementations.
BasicNamedAttribute
Implementation of a named object.
BasicNameValuePair
A simple immutable implementation of NameValuePair.
BasicOpenApiConfig
Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports OpenAPI transport.
BasicOpenApiProvider
Basic implementation of an OpenApiProvider.
BasicOpenApiProviderSession
A single session of generating an OpenAPI 3.1 document.
BasicPart
Implementation of NameValuePair for serializing POJOs as URL-encoded form post entries.
BasicPartIterator
Basic implementation of a PartIterator.
BasicPropertyNamer
Default property namer.
BasicPrototextConfig
Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports Protobuf Text Format transport.
BasicResource
A basic HttpResource implementation with additional features.
BasicRestCallHandler
Default HTTP call handler.
BasicRestCallInterceptor
A default implementation of a RestCallInterceptor.
BasicRestLogger
Convenience RestLogger implementation that routes log entries to a System.Logger.
BasicRestLogger.Builder
Fluent builder for BasicRestLogger.
BasicRestResource
Identical to BasicRestServlet but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
BasicRestResourceGroup
Identical to BasicRestServletGroup but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
BasicRestServlet
Subclass of RestServlet with default settings and standard endpoints defined.
BasicRestServletGroup
Specialized subclass of BasicRestServlet for showing "group" pages.
BasicRuntimeException
Subclass of runtime exceptions that take in a message and zero or more arguments.
BasicRuntimeException
Subclass of runtime exceptions that take in a message and zero or more arguments.
BasicSpringRestServlet
Subclass of SpringRestServlet with default settings and standard endpoints defined.
BasicSpringRestServletGroup
Specialized subclass of BasicSpringRestServlet for showing "group" pages.
BasicStaticFiles
API for retrieving localized static files from either the classpath or file system.
BasicStatusLine
A basic implementation of the StatusLine interface.
BasicStringHeader
Category of headers that consist of a single string value.
BasicStringPart
A NameValuePair that consists of a single string value.
BasicStringRangesHeader
Category of headers that consist of simple comma-delimited lists of strings with q-values.
BasicSwaggerProvider
Basic implementation of a SwaggerProvider.
BasicSwaggerProviderSession
A single session of generating a Swagger document.
BasicTestCallLogger
Default implementation of a CallLogger that only logs REST call errors unless no-log is enabled on the request.
BasicTestCaptureCallLogger
Implementation of a CallLogger that captures log entries for testing logging itself.
BasicTextFormat
Basic text formatter.
BasicTomcatServerFactory
Basic implementation of a Tomcat server factory.
BasicTomlConfig
Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports TOML transport.
BasicUniversalConfig
Predefined configuration for a REST resource that supports all languages and provides common default configuration values.
BasicUniversalJenaConfig
Identical to BasicUniversalConfig but includes RDF marshalling support.
BasicUriHeader
Category of headers that consist of a single URL value.
BasicUriPart
A NameValuePair that consists of a single URL value.
BasicYamlConfig
Basic configuration for a REST resource that supports YAML transport.
BctAssertions
Comprehensive utility class for Bean-Centric Tests (BCT) and general testing operations.
BctConfig
Annotation for configuring BCT settings in JUnit 5 tests.
BctConfigExtension
JUnit 5 extension that processes BctConfig annotations.
BctConfiguration
Configuration utility for Bean-Centric Testing (BCT) framework.
BctConfiguration.Defaults
Holder for @Value-resolved BCT default sort flags.
BctUtils
Bean-Centric Testing utility methods.
Bdi
DTO for an HTML <bdi> element.
Bdo
DTO for an HTML <bdo> element.
Bean
Bean injection annotation.
BeanAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Bean annotation.
BeanAnnotation.Array
A collection of @Bean annotations.
BeanAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
BeanAssertion<T>
Used for assertion calls against Java beans.
BeanChannel<T>
A lifecycle-aware round-trip interface that combines both BeanSupplier (for serialization) and BeanConsumer (for parsing) on the same property or class.
BeanConfig
Annotation for specifying bean-modeling config properties on REST classes and methods.
BeanConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @BeanConfig annotation.
BeanConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @BeanConfig annotation.
BeanConfigAnnotation.Applier
Applies BeanConfig annotations to a MarshallingContext.Builder.
BeanConfigContext
Immutable runtime configuration for the bean-modeling layer.
BeanConfigContext.Builder
Builder for BeanConfigContext.
BeanConsumer<T>
A lifecycle-aware consumer for use as a parser target, receiving deserialized beans one at a time.
BeanConverter
Abstract interface for Bean-Centric Test (BCT) object conversion and property access.
BeanCreationException
Unchecked exception thrown when a bean creator method is found but its invocation fails.
BeanCtor
Maps constructor arguments to property names on beans with read-only properties.
BeanCtorAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @BeanCtor annotation.
BeanCtorAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
BeanCtorApply
Dynamically applies a @BeanCtor annotation to specified constructors.
BeanCtorApply.Array
A collection of @BeanCtorApply annotations.
BeanCtorApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @BeanCtorApply annotation.
BeanCtorApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted BeanCtorApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
BeanCtorApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
BeanDescription
Simple serializable bean description.
BeanDescription.BeanPropertyDescription
Information about a bean property.
BeanDictionaryList
Represents a collection of bean classes that make up a bean dictionary.
BeanDictionaryMap
Represents a map of dictionary type names to bean classes that make up a bean dictionary.
BeanDiff
Utility class for comparing two versions of a POJO.
BeanDiff.Builder<T>
Builder class.
BeanExample
Sample class which shows the usage of DTO module which is a Sub module of the core.
BeanFactory<T>
A universal factory interface used with @Marshalled(factory=X.class) for any bean type the framework needs to instantiate.
BeanFactory.Void
Sentinel class used as the default value for @BeanType(factory=...) and @BeanProp(factory=...) when no factory is specified.
BeanFilter
Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the per-class filter surface the bean-runtime types (BeanMeta-equivalent) need without coupling the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side MarshalledFilter.
BeanIgnore
Excludes a class, field, method, or constructor from bean introspection.
BeanIgnoreAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @BeanIgnore annotation.
BeanIgnoreAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
BeanIgnoreApply
Dynamically applies a @BeanIgnore annotation to specified classes, methods, fields, or constructors.
BeanIgnoreApply.Array
A collection of @BeanIgnoreApply annotations.
BeanIgnoreApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @BeanIgnoreApply annotation.
BeanIgnoreApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted BeanIgnoreApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
BeanIgnoreApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
BeanInfo<T>
Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the type-classification surface the bean-runtime types (BeanMeta-equivalents, BeanPropertyMeta-equivalents, etc.) need without coupling the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side ClassMeta.
BeanInstantiator<T>
Utility class for creating beans through constructors, creator methods, and builders.
BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
Builder for BeanInstantiator.
BeanInstantiator.Scope
Lifecycle scope for the bean being created.
BeanInterceptor<T>
Bean interceptor.
BeanInterceptor.Void
Non-existent bean interceptor.
BeanListAssertion<E>
Used for assertion calls against Java beans.
BeanMap<T>
Java bean wrapper class.
BeanMapEntry
Represents a single entry in a bean map.
BeanMapLoader
Marshalling-side helper for loading BeanMap contents from JSON text or a reader/parser pair.
BeanMeta<T>
Encapsulates all access to the properties of a bean class (like a souped-up BeanInfo).
BeanMeta.BeanMetaValue<T>
Represents the result of creating a BeanMeta, including the bean metadata and any reason why it's not a bean.
BeanMetaInitializer
Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes marshalling-aware BeanMeta construction hooks.
BeanProp
Annotation that can be applied to bean fields, getter/setter methods, and constructor parameters to control bean introspection and property modeling.
BeanPropAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @BeanProp annotation.
BeanPropAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
BeanPropApply
Dynamically applies a @BeanProp annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
BeanPropApply.Array
A collection of @BeanPropApply annotations.
BeanPropApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @BeanPropApply annotation.
BeanPropApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted BeanPropApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
BeanPropApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
BeanPropertyConsumer
Represents a consumer of a single bean property value.
BeanPropertyMeta
Contains metadata about a bean property.
BeanPropertyMeta.Builder
BeanPropertyMeta builder class.
BeanPropertyPostProcessor
Bean-modeling SPI seam that applies marshalling-side post-processing to a BeanPropertyMeta.Builder after BeanPropertyMeta.Builder#validate() succeeds.
BeanPropertyValue
Represents a simple bean property value and the meta-data associated with it.
BeanProxyInvocationHandler<T>
Provides an InvocationHandler for creating dynamic proxy instances of bean interfaces.
BeanRegistry
A lookup table for resolving bean types by name.
BeanRegistryLookup
Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the dictionary-lookup surface the bean-runtime types need without coupling the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side BeanRegistry.
BeanRuntimeException
A RuntimeException wrapper around common reflection exceptions.
BeanSession
Minimum runtime surface that the bean-modeling layer needs from a marshalling session.
BeanStore
Spring-bean-like interface for looking up beans by type and name.
BeanStoreOverridable<B extends BeanStoreOverridable<B>>
Marker interface for builders that accept an overriding BeanStore — a layer whose entries take precedence over the builder's local bean registrations during construction-time reflective injection.
BeanSupplier<T>
A lifecycle-aware producer for use as a serializer source, providing beans lazily one at a time.
BeanType
Annotation that can be applied to classes to control bean introspection and modeling.
BeanTypeAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @BeanType annotation.
BeanTypeAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
BeanTypeApply
Dynamically applies a @BeanType annotation to specified classes.
BeanTypeApply.Array
A collection of @BeanTypeApply annotations.
BeanTypeApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @BeanTypeApply annotation.
BeanTypeApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted BeanTypeApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
BeanTypeApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
BeanTypeResolver
Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the type-resolution operations the bean-property validation pass needs from the marshalling layer.
BeanValidator
Static dispatcher for the optional Jakarta Bean Validation 3.x integration.
BearerTokenAuthFilter
AuthFilter that authenticates requests via the RFC 6750 Bearer Token scheme.
BearerTokenAuthFilter.Builder
Builder class.
BearerTokenGuard
AuthN RestGuard that authenticates requests via the RFC 6750 Bearer Token scheme.
BearerTokenGuard.Builder
Builder class.
BidiMap<K,V>
A bidirectional map with reverse key lookup by value.
BidiMap.Builder<K,V>
Builder class for BidiMap.
BigNumberFormat
Supported wire formats for BigInteger and BigDecimal values.
BinaryFormat
Supported wire formats for byte[] values and stream-based serialization output.
BinaryNativeKind
Discriminant returned by TokenReader.getNativeKind() that classifies the binary-native metadata (if any) carried by the cursor's current token.
BinarySwap
Thin delegating swap for top-level byte[] values in textual serializers.
BitSetFormat
Supported wire formats for BitSet values.
BlobResourceContents
Base64 blob body for resources/read results or embedded resource content.
Blockquote
DTO for an HTML <blockquote> element.
Body
DTO for an HTML <body> element.
BodyConverter<T>
Converts a Java object passed to RestRequest.body(Object) into a TransportBody.
BodyConverter.ThrowingConverter<T>
A checked function used by BodyConverter.of(Class, ThrowingConverter).
BooleanAssertion
Used for assertion calls against booleans.
BooleanFormat
Supported wire formats for Boolean / boolean values.
BooleanFunctions
Boolean-logic and comparison functions for the #{...} script catalog.
BooleanFunctions.And
#{and(a, b, ...)} — returns "true" only if all args are true.
BooleanFunctions.Eq
#{eq(a, b)} — string-equality.
BooleanFunctions.Gt
#{gt(a, b)} — numeric greater-than.
BooleanFunctions.Gte
#{gte(a, b)} — numeric greater-than-or-equal.
BooleanFunctions.Lt
#{lt(a, b)} — numeric less-than.
BooleanFunctions.Lte
#{lte(a, b)} — numeric less-than-or-equal.
BooleanFunctions.Neq
#{neq(a, b)} — string-inequality.
BooleanFunctions.Not
#{not(a)} — returns the boolean negation of a.
BooleanFunctions.Or
#{or(a, b, ...)} — returns "true" if any arg is true.
BooleanFunctions.Xor
#{xor(a, b)} — returns a XOR b.
BooleanHolder
A simple mutable boolean value.
BoundedLruTokenCache
Thread-safe bounded LRU implementation of TokenCache.
BoundedServletInputStream
ServletInputStream wrapper around a normal input stream with support for limiting input.
Br
DTO for an HTML <br> element.
Bson
Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by BsonSerializer and BsonParser.
Bson
A pairing of a BsonSerializer and BsonParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
BsonAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Bson annotation.
BsonAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
BsonApply
Dynamically applies a @Bson annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
BsonApply.Array
A collection of @BsonApply annotations.
BsonApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @BsonApply annotation.
BsonApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted BsonApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
BsonApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
BsonBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to the BSON serializers and parsers pulled from the @Bson annotation on the bean property.
BsonClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to the BSON serializers and parsers pulled from the @Bson annotation on the class.
BsonConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in BsonSerializer and BsonParser.
BsonConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @BsonConfig annotation.
BsonConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies BsonConfig annotations to a BsonParser.Builder.
BsonConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies BsonConfig annotations to a BsonSerializer.Builder.
BsonDecimal128
IEEE 754-2008 Decimal128 BID (Binary Integer Decimal) encoding for BSON.
BsonInputStream
Specialized input stream for parsing BSON (Binary JSON) streams.
BsonMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to BsonClassMeta and BsonBeanPropertyMeta objects.
BsonOutputStream
Specialized output stream for serializing BSON (Binary JSON) streams.
BsonParser
Parses BSON (Binary JSON) into POJO models.
BsonParser.Base64
Default parser, string input encoded as BASE64.
BsonParser.Builder
Builder class.
BsonParser.SpacedHex
Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex.
BsonParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of BsonParser.
BsonParserSession.Builder
Builder class.
BsonSerializer
Serializes POJO models to BSON (Binary JSON).
BsonSerializer.Base64
Default serializer, BASE64 string output.
BsonSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
BsonSerializer.SpacedHex
Default serializer, spaced-hex string output.
BsonSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of BsonSerializer.
BsonSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
Builder
Identifies a class as a builder for a POJO class.
Builder
Identifies a class as being a builder for a bean class.
BuilderSwap<T,B>
Specialized transform for builder classes.
Button
DTO for an HTML <button> element.
ByteArrayAssertion
Used for assertion calls against byte arrays.
ByteArrayBody
An HttpBody backed by a raw byte array.
ByteArrayEntity
A repeatable entity that obtains its content from a byte array.
ByteArrayResource
A repeatable resource that obtains its content from a byte array.
ByteHolder
A simple mutable byte value.
Cache<K,V>
Simple in-memory cache for storing and retrieving objects by key.
Cache.Builder<K,V>
Builder for creating configured Cache instances.
Cache2<K1,K2,V>
Simple in-memory cache for storing and retrieving objects by two-part keys.
Cache2.Builder<K1,K2,V>
Builder for creating configured Cache2 instances.
Cache3<K1,K2,K3,V>
Simple in-memory cache for storing and retrieving objects by three-part keys.
Cache3.Builder<K1,K2,K3,V>
Builder for creating configured Cache3 instances.
Cache4<K1,K2,K3,K4,V>
Simple in-memory cache for storing and retrieving objects by four-part keys.
Cache4.Builder<K1,K2,K3,K4,V>
Builder for creating configured Cache4 instances.
Cache5<K1,K2,K3,K4,K5,V>
Simple in-memory cache for storing and retrieving objects by five-part keys.
Cache5.Builder<K1,K2,K3,K4,K5,V>
Builder for creating configured Cache5 instances.
CacheControl
Represents a parsed Cache-Control HTTP request header.
CacheControl
Represents an HTTP Cache-Control header.
CacheControl.Builder
Fluent builder for assembling an HTTP Cache-Control header value.
CacheMode
Cache modes for Cache and related cache classes.
CachingConverter
An abstract Converter implementation that caches previously determined type conversions.
CachingHttpServletRequest
Wraps an HttpServletRequest and preloads the content into memory for debugging purposes.
CachingHttpServletResponse
Wraps an HttpServletResponse and caches the output stream in a separate buffer for debugging purposes.
CalendarFormat
Supported wire formats for Calendar values.
Callback
A map of possible out-of-band callbacks related to the parent operation.
CallLogger
Basic implementation of a CallLogger for logging HTTP requests.
CallLogger.Builder
Builder class.
CallLoggerRule
Represents a logging rule used by CallLogger.
CallLoggerRule.Builder
Builder class.
CallLoggingDetail
Represents the amount of detail to include in a log entry for HTTP requests and responses.
CallToolRequest
Parameters for "tools/call".
CallToolResult
Result payload for "tools/call".
Canvas
DTO for an HTML <canvas> element.
Caption
DTO for an HTML <caption> element.
CapturingFormat
Capturing format for test assertions.
CatchAllResponseProcessor
Marker interface for response processors that act as catch-alls — i.e. processors that accept any non-null return value when no more-specific processor matches.
Category
Represents a category or tag associated with a feed or entry.
Cbor
Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by CborSerializer and CborParser.
Cbor
A pairing of a CborSerializer and CborParser into a single class with convenience read/write methods.
CborAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Cbor annotation.
CborAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
CborApply
Dynamically applies a @Cbor annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
CborApply.Array
A collection of @CborApply annotations.
CborApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @CborApply annotation.
CborApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted CborApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
CborApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
CborBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to the CBOR serializers and parsers pulled from the @Cbor annotation on the bean property.
CborClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to the CBOR serializers and parsers pulled from the @Cbor annotation on the class.
CborConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in CborSerializer and CborParser.
CborConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @CborConfig annotation.
CborConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies CborConfig annotations to a CborParser.Builder.
CborConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies CborConfig annotations to a CborSerializer.Builder.
CborInputStream
Specialized input stream for parsing CBOR streams (RFC 8949).
CborMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to CborClassMeta and CborBeanPropertyMeta objects.
CborOutputStream
Specialized output stream for serializing CBOR streams (RFC 8949).
CborParser
Parses CBOR streams (RFC 8949) into POJO models.
CborParser.Base64
Default parser, string input encoded as BASE64.
CborParser.Builder
Builder class.
CborParser.SpacedHex
Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex.
CborParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of CborParser.
CborParserSession.Builder
Builder class.
CborSerializer
Serializes POJO models to CBOR (RFC 8949).
CborSerializer.Base64
Default serializer, BASE64 string output.
CborSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
CborSerializer.SpacedHex
Default serializer, spaced-hex string output.
CborSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of CborSerializer.
CborSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
CborTokenReader
Reference implementation of the public TokenReader surface for the CBOR format (RFC 8949).
CborTokenWriter
Reference implementation of the public TokenWriter surface for the CBOR format (RFC 8949).
CborTokenWriter.Settings
Cursor-level settings honored by CborTokenWriter.
CharHolder
A simple mutable character value.
CharMarshaller
A subclass of Marshaller for character-based serializers and parsers.
CharSequenceReader
A Reader implementation that reads from any CharSequence (String, StringBuilder, StringBuffer, etc.).
ChildResourceDescriptions
A POJO structure that describes the list of child resources associated with a resource.
Cite
DTO for an HTML <cite> element.
ClaimsPrincipal
A Principal that exposes typed read-only access to a map of claims.
ClassArrayFormat
Defines how array types should be formatted when rendered as strings.
ClassFormat
Supported wire formats for Class values.
ClassFormatSwap
Thin delegating swap for Class values driven by the context-configured ClassFormat.
ClassInfo
Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a class.
ClassInfoTyped<T>
Generic, typed variant of ClassInfo.
ClassMeta<T>
A wrapper class around the Class object that provides cached information about that class.
ClassMetaRuntimeException
General class metadata runtime operation exception.
ClassNameFormat
Defines how class names should be formatted when rendered as strings.
ClasspathStore
Classpath-based storage location for configuration files.
ClasspathStore.Builder
Builder class.
ClassUtils
Utility methods for working with classes.
ClassUtils2
Class-related utility methods.
ClientCapabilities
MCP client capability advertisement in InitializeRequest.
ClientVersion
Represents a parsed Client-Version HTTP request header.
ClientVersion
Represents an HTTP Client-Version header.
ClientVersionMatcher
Specialized matcher for matching client versions.
CloseableByteArrayInputStream
A ByteArrayInputStream with a usable close() method.
CloseableStringReader
A StringReader with a usable close() method.
Code
DTO for an HTML <code> element.
Col
DTO for an HTML <col> element.
Colgroup
DTO for an HTML <colgroup> element.
CollectionAssertion<E>
Used for assertion calls against collections objects.
CollectionFormat
Specifies how collection-valued query/form parameters are serialized to a single string.
CollectionFormatType
Static strings used for Swagger parameter collection format types.
CollectionUtils
Utility methods for working with collections and maps.
Command
Repository command executed by the server.
Common
Base class for all Atom elements, providing common attributes.
CommonEntry
Base class for feed-level and entry-level Atom elements.
ComparableAssertion<T extends Comparable<T>>
Used for assertion calls against comparable objects.
Components
Holds a set of reusable objects for different aspects of the OpenAPI Specification.
CompressionCodec
Parquet compression codecs supported by this implementation.
Condition
Predicate hook used by Conditional.
Conditional
Generic registration guard based on a custom Condition.
ConditionalFunctions
Conditional and routing functions for the #{...} script catalog.
ConditionalFunctions.Coalesce
#{coalesce(a, b, ...)} — replacement for the legacy $CO{...}.
ConditionalFunctions.If
#{if(cond, then, else)} — replacement for the legacy $IF{...}.
ConditionalFunctions.NotEmpty
#{notEmpty(s)} — replacement for the legacy $NE{...}.
ConditionalFunctions.Switch
#{switch(value, case1, val1, case2, val2, ..., default)} — replacement for the legacy $SW{...}.
ConditionalOnClass
Condition that requires a class to be present.
ConditionalOnClasses
Container for repeatable ConditionalOnClass.
ConditionalOnMissingBean
Condition that requires a bean to be absent in the current store.
ConditionalOnMissingBeans
Container for repeatable ConditionalOnMissingBean.
ConditionalOnProperties
Container for repeatable ConditionalOnProperty.
ConditionalOnProperty
Condition that checks a setting value.
Conditionals
Container annotation for repeatable Conditional.
ConditionContext
Runtime context for evaluating Condition instances.
Config
Main configuration API class.
Config.Builder
Builder class.
ConfigCommand
Implements the 'config' console command to get or set configuration.
ConfigEvent
Represents a change to a config.
ConfigEventListener
Listener that can be used to listen for change events in config maps.
ConfigEvents
Represents a list of ConfigEvent objects.
ConfigEventType
Possible event types for the ConfigEvent class.
ConfigException
An exception that typically occurs when trying to perform an invalid operation on a configuration property.
ConfigFormat
Format strategy for config map persistence.
ConfigItem
Configuration item representing a named value (e.g., a config file section).
ConfigMap
Represents the parsed contents of a configuration.
ConfigMapEntry
Represents a single entry in a configuration.
ConfigPropertySource
PropertySource adapter for Config.
ConfigPropertySourceProvider
Auto-registers a classpath-default juneau.cfg (and the other names returned by Config.getCandidateSystemDefaultConfigNames()) as a PropertySource for the process-wide Settings singleton.
ConfigResource
Shows contents of the microservice configuration file.
ConfigStore
Represents a storage location for configuration files.
ConfigStore.Builder<SELF extends ConfigStore.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
ConfigStoreListener
Listens for changes to stored config files.
ConfigurableConverter
A BasicConverter subclass that supports pluggable type conversion discovery via ConversionFinder.
Configuration
Marks a type that contributes one or more Bean declarations.
ConfigVar
Config file variable resolver.
Conflict
Exception representing an HTTP 409 (Conflict).
Conflict
Represents an HTTP 409 Conflict error response.
Connection
Represents a parsed Connection HTTP request header.
Connection
Represents an HTTP Connection header.
Console
A utility for logging formatted messages to the console.
ConsoleCommand
Implements a command that can be invoked from the console of the microservice.
Constants
Global constants used across the Juneau framework.
Constants
Global constants used across the Juneau framework.
Constants
HTTP-Part constants.
Constants
Constants used by the RdfSerializer and RdfParser classes.
ConstructorInfo
Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a Java constructor.
Consumer2<A,B>
A functional interface representing an operation that accepts two arguments and returns no result.
Consumer3<A,B,C>
A functional interface representing an operation that accepts three arguments and returns no result.
Consumer4<A,B,C,D>
A functional interface representing an operation that accepts four arguments and returns no result.
Consumer5<A,B,C,D,E>
A functional interface representing an operation that accepts five arguments and returns no result.
Contact
Contact information for the exposed API.
Contact
Contact information for the exposed API.
Contact
Swagger contact annotation.
ContactAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Contact annotation.
ContactAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
Content
Represents the content of an Atom entry.
Content
Polymorphic MCP content block (tool results, prompt messages).
Content
REST request body annotation.
ContentArg
Resolves method parameters and parameter types annotated with Content on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
ContentDisposition
Represents a parsed Content-Disposition HTTP request header.
ContentDisposition
Represents an HTTP Content-Disposition header.
ContentDisposition.Builder
Fluent builder for assembling an HTTP Content-Disposition header value.
ContentEncoding
Represents a parsed Content-Encoding HTTP response header.
ContentEncoding
Represents an HTTP Content-Encoding header.
ContentLanguage
Represents a parsed Content-Language HTTP response header.
ContentLanguage
 
ContentLength
Represents a parsed Content-Length HTTP request/response header.
ContentLength
Represents an HTTP Content-Length header.
ContentLocation
Represents a parsed Content-Location HTTP response header.
ContentLocation
 
ContentRange
Represents a parsed Content-Range HTTP response header.
ContentRange
Represents an HTTP Content-Range header.
ContentRange.Builder
Fluent builder for assembling an HTTP Content-Range header value.
ContentSecurityPolicy
Represents an HTTP Content-Security-Policy (or Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only) response header.
ContentSecurityPolicy.Builder
Fluent builder for assembling a Content-Security-Policy header value.
ContentType
Represents a parsed Content-Type HTTP request/response header.
ContentType
Represents an HTTP Content-Type header.
ContentTypeMenuItem
Widget that returns back a list of hyperlinks for rendering the contents of a page in a variety of content types.
Context
Base class for all Context beans.
Context.Builder<SELF extends Context.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
ContextApply
Applied to Config annotations to identify the class used to push the values into a property store.
ContextBeanCreator<T>
Utility class for instantiating a Context bean.
ContextRuntimeException
General runtime operation exception that can occur in any of the context classes.
ContextSession
A one-time-use non-thread-safe object that's meant to be used once and then thrown away.
ContextSession.Builder<SELF extends ContextSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
Continue
Represents an HTTP 100 Continue response.
Continue
Represents an HTTP 100 Continue response.
ControlledArrayList<E>
An ArrayList that allows you to control whether it's read-only via a constructor parameter.
Conversion<I,O>
Functional interface representing a single type conversion used by CachingConverter.
ConversionFinder
A pluggable strategy for discovering Conversion functions between type pairs.
Converter
Interface for converting objects between types.
ConverterSession
Provides contextual objects to Conversion functions at call time.
ConverterUtils
Utility class for common type conversions and building typed collections and maps.
CookieList
A simple list of Cookie objects.
CopyOp
The JSON Patch "copy" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.5.
Created
Represents an HTTP 201 Created response.
Created
Represents an HTTP 201 Created response.
Csv
Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by CsvSerializer and CsvParser.
Csv
A pairing of a CsvSerializer and CsvParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
CsvAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Csv annotation.
CsvAnnotation.Builder
 
CsvApply
Dynamically applies a @Csv annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
CsvApply.Array
 
CsvApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @CsvApply annotation.
CsvApplyAnnotation.Applier
 
CsvApplyAnnotation.Builder
 
CsvBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to the CSV serializers and parsers pulled from the @Csv annotation on the bean property.
CsvByteArrayCellFormat
Format for serializing byte[] arrays in CSV cells.
CsvCellParser
Parses CSV cell inline notation: {key:val;key2:val2} and [val1;val2;val3].
CsvCellSerializer
Serializes nested objects and arrays to CSV cell inline notation: {key:val;key2:val2} and [val1;val2;val3].
CsvClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to the CSV serializers and parsers pulled from the @Csv annotation on the class.
CsvConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in CsvSerializer and CsvParser.
CsvConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @CsvConfig annotation.
CsvConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies CsvConfig annotations to a CsvParser.Builder.
CsvConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies CsvConfig annotations to a CsvSerializer.Builder.
CsvMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to CsvClassMeta and CsvBeanPropertyMeta objects.
CsvParser
Parses CSV (Comma Separated Values) input into Java objects.
CsvParser.Builder
Builder class.
CsvParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of CsvParser.
CsvParserSession.Builder
Builder class.
CsvReader
Specialized reader for parsing CSV input.
CsvSerializer
Serializes POJO models to CSV (Comma Separated Values) format.
CsvSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
CsvSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of CsvSerializer.
CsvSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
CsvWriter
Specialized writer for serializing CSV.
CurrencyFormat
Supported wire formats for Currency values.
Data
DTO for an HTML <data> element.
Datalist
DTO for an HTML <datalist> element.
DataType
BSON element type codes per the BSON Specification 1.1.
Date
Represents a parsed Date HTTP request/response header.
Date
 
DateAssertion
Used for assertion calls against Date objects.
DateFormat
Supported wire formats for Date values.
DateFunctions
Date/time functions for the #{...} script catalog.
DateFunctions.FormatDate
#{formatDate(epoch)} — renders epoch as ISO-8601 (Instant.toString()).
DateFunctions.Now
#{now()} — current epoch milliseconds (UTC).
DateFunctions.ParseDate
#{parseDate(s)} / #{parseDate(s, format)} — parses an ISO-8601 string or a DateTimeFormatter-pattern string to epoch milliseconds.
DateUtils
A utility class for parsing and formatting HTTP dates as used in cookies and other headers.
Dd
DTO for an HTML <dd> element.
Debug
Represents a parsed Debug HTTP request/response header.
Debug
 
Debug
Debug configuration metadata for @Rest and @RestOp.

DebugConfig
Debug configuration with class/method targeted rules.
DebugConfig.Builder

DebugEnablement
Interface used for selectively turning on debug per request.
DebugEnablement.Builder
Builder class.
DebugEnablementMap
A reflection map for the Enablement setting.
DebugEnablementMap.Builder
Builder class.
DebugFormat
Formatter abstraction for debug logging.
DebugFormat.Void
Represents no format.
DebugFormatContext
Input values used by DebugFormat.
DebugResource
Microservice debug utilities.
DebugResult
Resolved per-request debug decision.
DebugRule
Debug rule carrying enablement and formatting settings.
DebugRule.Builder
Builder class.
DefaultArg
Resolves method parameters on RestOp-annotated Java methods by retrieving them by type from the REST object bean store.
DefaultConfig
Predefined REST configuration that defines common default values for all configurations.
DefaultHtmlConfig
Predefined REST configuration that defines common default values for HTML Doc serializers.
DefaultingTemporalAccessor
Wraps a TemporalAccessor to provide default values wherever possible instead of throwing unsupported field exceptions.
DefaultingVar
Interface for the resolution of vars with a default value if the resolve() method returns null.
DefaultSwaps
Maintain the list of default swaps used by all serializers and parsers.
Del
DTO for an HTML <del> element.
Delegate<T>
An object that represents another object, often wrapping that object.
DelegateBeanMap<T>
Represents a wrapped BeanMap where property values can be overridden, removed, or reordered without affecting the underlying bean.
DelegateList<T extends Collection<?>>
Represents a wrapped Collection where entries in the list can be removed or reordered without affecting the underlying list.
DelegateMap<T extends Map>
Represents a wrapped Map where entries in the map can be removed without affecting the underlying map.
DenyAllGuard
Deny-all RestGuard — rejects every request with 403 Forbidden.
DetailLevel
Identifies an arbitrary detail level such as the detail of log messages.
Dfn
DTO for an HTML <dfn> element.
DirectoryResource
REST resource that allows access to a file system directory.
DirectoryResource.Action
File action link.
Discriminator
Used to aid in serialization, deserialization, and validation.
Div
DTO for an HTML <div> element.
Dl
DTO for an HTML <dl> element.
DotenvPropertySource
Property source backed by a dotenv file.
DotenvPropertySourceProvider
Provider for DotenvPropertySource.
DotenvVar
Dotenv file variable resolver.
DoubleHolder
A simple mutable double value.
Dt
DTO for an HTML <dt> element.
DumpsManager
Shared worker for the diagnostic dump endpoints (/threaddump, /heapdump).
DumpsMixin
Mixin flavor of the diagnostic dump endpoints (/threaddump, /heapdump).
DumpsResource
Child-resource flavor of the diagnostic dump endpoints (/threaddump, /heapdump).
DumpsSettings
Deny-by-default exposure settings for the diagnostic dump endpoints (/threaddump, /heapdump).
DumpsSettings.Builder
Builder for DumpsSettings.
DurationFormat
Supported wire formats for Duration values.
EarlyHints
Represents an HTTP 103 Early Hints response.
EarlyHints
Represents an HTTP 103 Early Hints response.
EchoMixin

EchoMixin.Builder

ElementFlag

ElementInfo

Embed
DTO for an HTML <embed> element.
EmbeddedResourceContent
MCP resource content block (inline resource body).
Enablement
Represents the enablement settings of a feature.
Encoder
Used for enabling decompression on requests and compression on responses, such as support for GZIP compression.
EncoderMatch
Represents a encoder and encoding that matches an HTTP Accept-Encoding header value.
EncoderSet
Represents the set of encoders keyed by codings.
EncoderSet.Builder
Builder class.
EncoderSet.Inherit
An identifier that the previous encoders in this group should be inherited.
EncoderSet.NoInherit
An identifier that the previous encoders in this group should not be inherited.
Encoding
A single encoding definition applied to a single schema property.
EncodingFunctions
Encoding / escaping functions for the #{...} script catalog.
EncodingFunctions.Base64Decode
#{base64Decode(s)} — Base64-decodes s (UTF-8 result).
EncodingFunctions.Base64Encode
#{base64Encode(s)} — Base64-encodes s (UTF-8).
EncodingFunctions.HtmlEscape
#{htmlEscape(s)} — escapes &, <, >, ", ' (the OWASP minimal HTML-injection-safe set).
EncodingFunctions.HtmlUnescape
#{htmlUnescape(s)} — inverse of EncodingFunctions.HtmlEscape.
EncodingFunctions.UrlDecode
#{urlDecode(s)} — URL-form-decodes.
EncodingFunctions.UrlEncode
#{urlEncode(s)} — URL-form-encodes (i.e.
EntityTag
Represents a validator value.
EntityTags
A list of EntityTag beans.
Entry
Represents an individual entry within an Atom feed or as a standalone Atom document.
Entry
A single entry in a Config file.
EnumFormat
Supported wire formats for Enum values.
EnvFileVar
Environment-file variable resolver.
EnvVariablesVar
Environment variable variable resolver.
EphemeralJettyServerConfig
A @Configuration that supplies a Jetty Server bound to an OS-assigned ephemeral port (port 0) for use by @MicroserviceTest-driven integration tests.
EphemeralStore
Single-use, TTL-bounded store for the per-login state → (nonce, codeVerifier, redirectTarget) association created during OidcRelyingParty.startLogin(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse) and consumed during OidcRelyingParty.completeLogin(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse).
EphemeralStore.PendingLogin
A pending-login association awaiting the IdP callback.
Equality
Represents possible values for number and date comparisons.
ErrorMixin
Mixin providing the residual [* /error] endpoint.
ETag
Represents a parsed ETag HTTP response header.
ETag
Represents an HTTP ETag header.
Example
information for Examples object.
Example
Identifies examples for POJOs.
ExampleAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Example annotation.
ExampleAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
ExampleApply
Dynamically applies an @Example annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
ExampleApply.Array
A collection of @ExampleApply annotations.
ExampleApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @ExampleApply annotation.
ExampleApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted ExampleApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
ExampleApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
ExecutableException
General exception that occurs when trying to execute a constructor, method, or field using reflection.
ExecutableInfo
Abstract base class containing common functionality for ConstructorInfo and MethodInfo.
ExitCommand
Implements the 'exit' console command to gracefully shut down the microservice and JVM.
Expect
Represents a parsed Expect HTTP request header.
Expect
Represents an HTTP Expect header.
ExpectationFailed
Exception representing an HTTP 417 (Expectation Failed).
ExpectationFailed
Represents an HTTP 417 Expectation Failed error response.
Expires

Defines extended language-specific metadata associated with a bean.

Defines extended language-specific metadata associated with a bean property.

ExtendedMeta

ExternalDocumentation

ExternalDocumentation
Allows referencing an external resource for extended documentation.
FailedDependency

FailedDependency
Represents an HTTP 424 Failed Dependency error response.

FaviconProvider

FaviconResource

FaviconServlet

Feed
Represents a top-level Atom feed document.
FieldInfo
Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a Java field.
Fieldset
DTO for an HTML <fieldset> element.
Figcaption
DTO for an HTML <figcaption> element.
Figure
DTO for an HTML <figure> element.
FileBody
A repeatable HttpBody that streams content from a File.
FileEntity
A repeatable entity that obtains its content from a File.
FileFinder
Utility class for finding regular or localized files on the classpath and file system.
FileFinder.Builder
Builder class.
FileFinder.Void
Represents no file finder
FileReaderBuilder
A fluent builder for creating Reader instances from files with configurable character encoding.
FileResource
A repeatable resource that obtains its content from a File.
FileStore
Filesystem-based storage location for configuration files.
FileStore.Builder
Builder class.
FileUtils
File utilities.
FileVar
File resource variable resolver
FileWriterBuilder
A fluent builder for creating Writer instances for writing to files with configurable options.
FilteredKeyMap<K,V>
Wrapper around a map where the key names are overridden.
FilteredList<E>
A list wrapper that filters elements based on a Predicate when they are added.
FilteredList.Builder<E>
Builder for creating FilteredList instances.
FilteredMap<K,V>
A map wrapper that filters entries based on a BiPredicate when they are added.
FilteredMap.Builder<K,V>
Builder for creating FilteredMap instances.
FilteredSet<E>
A set wrapper that filters elements based on a Predicate when they are added.
FilteredSet.Builder<E>
Builder for creating FilteredSet instances.
Finishable
Interface that identifies an output stream has having a finish() method.
FinishablePrintWriter
A wrapped PrintWriter with an added finish() method.
FinishableServletOutputStream
A wrapped ServletOutputStream with an added finish() method.
Flag
A simple mutable boolean flag.
FloatFormat
Supported wire formats for non-finite Float / Double values (NaN, +Infinity, -Infinity).
FloatHolder
A simple mutable float value.
FluentAnyAssertion<T,R>
Used for assertion calls against generic POJOs.
FluentArrayAssertion<E,R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against array objects.
FluentAssertion<R>
Parent class of all fluent assertion calls.
FluentBeanAssertion<T,R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against Java beans.
FluentBeanListAssertion<E,R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against lists of beans.
FluentBooleanAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against booleans.
FluentByteArrayAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against byte arrays.
FluentCollectionAssertion<E,R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against collections objects.
FluentComparableAssertion<T extends Comparable,R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against comparable objects.
FluentDateAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against dates.
FluentIntegerAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against integers.
FluentList<E>
A fluent wrapper around an arbitrary list that provides convenient methods for adding elements.
FluentListAssertion<E,R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against lists.
FluentLongAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against longs.
FluentMap<K,V>
A fluent wrapper around an arbitrary map that provides convenient methods for adding entries.
FluentMapAssertion<K,V,R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against maps.
FluentObjectAssertion<T,R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against POJOs.
FluentPrimitiveArrayAssertion<E,T,R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against primitive array objects (e.g.
FluentProtocolVersionAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against HttpProtocolVersion objects.
FluentRequestContentAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against RequestContent objects.
FluentRequestFormParamAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against RequestFormParam objects.
FluentRequestHeaderAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against RequestHeader objects.
FluentRequestLineAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against HttpRequestLine objects.
FluentRequestQueryParamAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against RequestQueryParam objects.
FluentResponseBodyAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against ResponseContent objects.
FluentResponseHeaderAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against ResponseHeader objects.
FluentResponseStatusLineAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against a response StatusLine object.
FluentSet<E>
A fluent wrapper around an arbitrary set that provides convenient methods for adding elements.
FluentStringAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against strings.
FluentStringListAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against lists of strings.
FluentThrowableAssertion<T extends Throwable,R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against throwables.
FluentVersionAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against Version objects.
FluentZonedDateTimeAssertion<R>
Used for fluent assertion calls against ZonedDateTime objects.
Footer
DTO for an HTML <footer> element.
Forbidden
Exception representing an HTTP 403 (Forbidden).
Forbidden
Represents an HTTP 403 Forbidden error response.
Form
DTO for an HTML <form> element.
FormatType
Static strings used for Swagger parameter format types.
FormData
REST request form-data annotation.
FormDataArg
Resolves method parameters and parameter types annotated with FormData on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
Forwarded
Represents a parsed Forwarded HTTP request header.
Forwarded
Represents an HTTP Forwarded header.
Forwarded.Builder
Fluent builder for assembling an HTTP Forwarded header value.
Found
Represents an HTTP 302 Found response.
Found
Represents an HTTP 302 Found response.
FreemarkerDispatcher
Flavor-neutral worker bean carrying the FreeMarker raw-template-dispatch logic shared by the FreemarkerMixin mixin, the FreemarkerServlet servlet, and the FreemarkerResource child flavors.
FreemarkerDispatcher.Builder
Builder for FreemarkerDispatcher.
FreemarkerMixin
Mixin that wires Apache FreeMarker view-rendering onto any Juneau REST resource.
FreemarkerMixin.Builder
Builder for FreemarkerMixin.
FreemarkerResource
Child-resource flavor of the FreemarkerMixin mixin.
FreemarkerServlet
Standalone servlet companion of the FreemarkerMixin mixin.
FreemarkerView
Immutable value class returned from @RestOp-annotated methods to ask the framework to render an Apache FreeMarker template.
FreemarkerViewRenderer
ResponseProcessor that detects FreemarkerView-typed return values and asks the configured Configuration to render them directly onto the response writer.
From
Represents a parsed From HTTP request header.
From
Represents an HTTP From header.
Function2<A,B,R>
A functional interface representing a function that accepts two arguments and produces a result.
Function3<A,B,C,R>
A functional interface representing a function that accepts three arguments and produces a result.
Function4<A,B,C,D,R>
A functional interface representing a function that accepts four arguments and produces a result.
Function5<A,B,C,D,E,R>
A functional interface representing a function that accepts five arguments and produces a result.
FunctionalPropertySource
A functional interface for creating read-only PropertySource instances from a function.
FunctionalPropertyStore
A writable PropertyStore implementation created from functional interfaces.
FunctionalSwap<T,S>
A subclass of ObjectSwap that allows swap and unswap methods to be defined as functions.
GatewayTimeout
Represents an HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout error response.
Generator
Identifies the software agent used to generate an Atom feed.
GetConfiguration
Command that fetches configuration from a Git repository for a given project and branch.
GetPromptRequest
Parameters for "prompts/get".
GetPromptResult
Result payload for "prompts/get".
GetValue<T>
Callback interface for retrieving a value after asynchronous execution.
GitControl
Git repository control operations for cloning, pulling, pushing, and committing.
Gone
Exception representing an HTTP 410 ().
Gone
Represents an HTTP 410 Gone error response.
GranularZonedDateTime
A ZonedDateTime with precision information for granular time operations.
GzipEncoder
Encoder for handling "gzip" encoding and decoding.
H1
DTO for an HTML <h1> element.
H2
DTO for an HTML <h2> element.
H3
DTO for an HTML <h3> element.
H4
DTO for an HTML <h4> element.
H5
DTO for an HTML <h5> element.
H6
DTO for an HTML <h6> element.
HalLink
Represents a HAL Link Object as defined by draft-kelly-json-hal-08 § 5.
HalLinkArray
Represents a list of HalLink objects.
HalLinkOrArraySwap
Per-property ObjectSwap applied to HAL _links maps so that each map entry round-trips as either a single HalLink (JSON object) or a HalLinkArray (JSON array) per the spec.
HalResource
Represents a HAL Resource Object as defined by draft-kelly-json-hal-08 § 4.
HalResourceArray
Represents a list of HalResource objects.
HalResourceOrArraySwap
Per-property ObjectSwap applied to HAL _embedded maps so that each map entry round-trips as either a single HalResource (JSON object) or a HalResourceArray (JSON array) per the spec.
HasFormData
REST has-form-data annotation.
HasFormDataArg
Resolves method parameters annotated with HasFormData on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
HashCode
Utility class for generating integer hash codes.
HashKey
Represents a composite key composed of multiple values, suitable for use as a key in hash-based collections.
HasQuery
REST has-query-parameter annotation.
HasQueryArg
Resolves method parameters annotated with HasQuery on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
Head
DTO for an HTML <head> element.
Header
DTO for an HTML <header> element.
Header
REST request header annotation.
Headerable
Identifies a class that can be converted to a Header object.
HeaderArg
Resolves method parameters and parameter types annotated with Header on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
HeaderBeanMeta<T>
Holds metadata about header beans (POJOs that get serialized as HTTP headers).
HeaderElement
Represents a parsed element from an HTTP header value.
HeaderInfo
Describes a single HTTP header.
HeaderInfo
Describes a single HTTP header.
HeaderList
A simple list of HTTP headers with various convenience methods.
HeaderList.Void
Represents no header list in annotations.
HeaderValueParser
Lightweight parser for HTTP header values as defined by RFC 2616.
Health
Component health result returned from a HealthIndicator.
Health.Builder
Builder for Health.
HealthAggregator
Shared health-probe aggregation worker bean.
HealthAggregator.ComponentHealth
Component payload in the response.
HealthAggregator.HealthResponse
Probe response payload.
HealthIndicator
Functional SPI for reporting health of one component.
HealthMixin
Mixin flavor of the built-in health/readiness/liveness probe capability.
HealthProbe
Probe categories supported by the built-in health probe resource.
HealthProbeConfiguration
Opt-in probe configuration that auto-mounts HealthServlet.
HealthProbeSettings
Settings for the built-in health probe resource.
HealthProbeSettings.Builder
Builder for HealthProbeSettings.
HealthResource
Child-resource flavor of the built-in health/readiness/liveness probe capability.
HealthServlet
Servlet flavor of the built-in health/readiness/liveness probe capability.
HealthStatus
Status values returned by HealthIndicator checks.
HelloMessageProvider
Sample Spring bean injected into HelloResource to demonstrate the @Autowired pattern under Juneau SpringRestServlet-based deployments.
HelloResource
Tiny REST resource that demonstrates Spring @Autowired injection into a Juneau @Rest servlet under a Spring Boot deployment.
HelpCommand
Implements the 'restart' console command to gracefully shut down and restart the microservice.
Hjson
Annotation for customizing Hjson serialization and parsing behavior on classes, methods, and fields.
Hjson
A pairing of a HjsonSerializer and HjsonParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
HjsonAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Hjson annotation.
HjsonApply
Dynamically applies a @Hjson annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
HjsonApply.Array
A collection of @HjsonApply annotations.
HjsonApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @HjsonApply annotation.
HjsonApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted HjsonApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
HjsonApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
HjsonBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to Hjson serializers and parsers.
HjsonClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to Hjson serializers and parsers.
HjsonConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in HjsonSerializer and HjsonParser.
HjsonConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @HjsonConfig annotation.
HjsonConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies HjsonConfig annotations to an HjsonParser.Builder.
HjsonConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies HjsonConfig annotations to an HjsonSerializer.Builder.
HjsonMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to HjsonClassMeta and HjsonBeanPropertyMeta objects.
HjsonParser
Parses Hjson (Human JSON) text into POJO models.
HjsonParser.Builder
Builder class.
HjsonParserSession
Session for parsing Hjson format into POJOs.
HjsonParserSession.Builder
Builder for Hjson parser session.
HjsonSerializer
Serializes POJO models to Hjson (Human JSON).
HjsonSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
HjsonSerializerSession
Session for serializing objects to Hjson format.
HjsonSerializerSession.Builder
Builder for Hjson serializer session.
HjsonTokenizer
Tokenizer for Hjson format.
HjsonTokenizer.Token
A token with optional string or number value.
HjsonTokenizer.TokenType
Token types produced by the tokenizer.
HjsonWriter
Specialized writer for serializing Hjson format.

Annotation for customizing HOCON serialization and parsing behavior on classes, methods, and fields.

Host

Hr

HtdocMixin

Html

Html
Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by HtmlSerializer.
Html

HtmlAnnotation

HtmlApply

Applies targeted HtmlApply annotations to a Context.Builder.

Builder class.
HtmlBeanDictionary
Defines the Java classes that make up the HTML DTO type dictionary.
HtmlBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to the HTML serializers and parsers pulled from the @Html annotation on the bean property.
HtmlBuilder
Various useful static methods for creating HTML elements.
HtmlClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to the HTML serializers and parsers pulled from the @Html annotation on the class.
HtmlComplexExample
Sample class which shows the complex usage of HtmlSerializer and HtmlParser.
HtmlConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in HtmlSerializer, HtmlParser, and HtmlDocSerializer.
HtmlConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @HtmlConfig annotation.
HtmlConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies HtmlConfig annotations to a HtmlParser.Builder.
HtmlConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies HtmlConfig annotations to a HtmlSerializer.Builder.
HtmlDocConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in HtmlSerializer, HtmlParser, and HtmlDocSerializer.
HtmlDocConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @HtmlDocConfig annotation.
HtmlDocConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies HtmlDocConfig annotations to a HtmlDocSerializer.Builder.
HtmlDocSerializer
Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as HTML documents.
HtmlDocSerializer.Builder<SELF extends HtmlDocSerializer.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
HtmlDocSerializer.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed HtmlDocSerializer.create() / HtmlDocSerializer.copy() path.
HtmlDocSerializerSession
Context object that lives for the duration of a single serialization of HtmlSerializer and its subclasses.
HtmlDocSerializerSession.Builder<SELF extends HtmlDocSerializerSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
HtmlDocSerializerSession.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
HtmlDocTemplate
Defines the interface for rendering the contents of an HTML page produced by the HtmlDocSerializer serializer.
HtmlDocTemplate.Void
Represents a non-existent doc template.
HtmlElement
Superclass for all HTML elements.
HtmlElementContainer
A subclass of HTML elements that contain only other elements, not text.
HtmlElementMixed
A subclass of HTML elements that contain mixed content (elements and text).
HtmlElementRawText
A subclass of HTML elements that contain raw text only.
HtmlElementText
A subclass of HTML elements that contain text only.
HtmlElementVoid
A subclass of HTML elements that have no content or end tags.
HtmlFormat
Identifies possible values for the Html.format() annotation.
HtmlLink
Used in conjunction with the HtmlSerializer class to define hyperlinks.
HtmlLinkAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @HtmlLink annotation.
HtmlLinkAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
HtmlLinkApply
Dynamically applies a @HtmlLink annotation to specified classes.
HtmlLinkApply.Array
A collection of @HtmlLinkApply annotations.
HtmlLinkApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @HtmlLinkApply annotation.
HtmlLinkApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted HtmlLinkApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
HtmlLinkApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
HtmlMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to HtmlClassMeta and HtmlBeanPropertyMeta objects.
HtmlParser
Parses text generated by the HtmlSerializer class back into a POJO model.
HtmlParser.Builder
Builder class.
HtmlParserSession
ContextSession object that lives for the duration of a single use of HtmlParser.
HtmlParserSession.Builder
Builder class.
HtmlRender<T>
Allows custom rendering of bean property values when serialized as HTML.
HtmlSchemaDocSerializer
Serializes POJO metamodels to HTML.
HtmlSchemaDocSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
HtmlSchemaDocSerializerSession
Context object that lives for the duration of a single serialization of HtmlSchemaDocSerializer and its subclasses.
HtmlSchemaDocSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
HtmlSchemaSerializer
Serializes POJO metamodels to HTML.
HtmlSchemaSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
HtmlSchemaSerializer.Readable
Default serializer, with whitespace.
HtmlSchemaSerializer.Simple
Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode.
HtmlSchemaSerializer.SimpleReadable
Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode, with whitespace.
HtmlSchemaSerializerSession
Context object that lives for the duration of a single serialization of HtmlSchemaSerializer and its subclasses.
HtmlSchemaSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
HtmlSerializer
Serializes POJO models to HTML.
HtmlSerializer.Builder<SELF extends HtmlSerializer.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
HtmlSerializer.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed HtmlSerializer.create() / HtmlSerializer.copy() path.
HtmlSerializer.Sq
Default serializer, single quotes.
HtmlSerializer.SqReadable
Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added.
HtmlSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of HtmlSerializer.
HtmlSerializerSession.Builder<SELF extends HtmlSerializerSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
HtmlSerializerSession.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
HtmlSimpleExample
Sample class which shows the simple usage of HtmlSerializer and HtmlParser.
HtmlStrippedDocSerializer
Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as stripped HTML.
HtmlStrippedDocSerializer.Builder<SELF extends HtmlStrippedDocSerializer.Builder<SELF>>

HtmlStrippedDocSerializerSession.Builder<SELF extends HtmlStrippedDocSerializerSession.Builder<SELF>>
