HtmlText
An object that gets serialized as raw XML by the XML and HTML serializers.
HtmlWidget
Defines an interface for resolvers of "$W{...}"
HtmlWidgetMap
A collection of HtmlWidget objects keyed by their names.
HtmlWidgetVar
HTML widget variable resolver.
HtmlWriter
Specialized writer for serializing HTML.
HttpBodies
Static factory methods for creating common HTTP body types.
HttpBody
An HTTP message body (entity), providing content and its associated metadata.
HttpBodyBean
A mutable wrapper around an HttpBody that allows overriding the content type.
HttpBodyProcessor
Response handler for HttpBody objects (transport-neutral replacement for the historical Apache HttpClient 4.5 HttpEntity-keyed processor).
HttpBooleanHeader
Base for boolean headers.
HttpBooleanPart
An HttpPart whose value is a boolean.
HttpCsvArrayPart
An HttpPart whose value is a comma-delimited list of strings.
HttpCsvHeader
Base for simple comma-separated token lists.
HttpDateHeader
Base for HTTP-date headers.
HttpDatePart
An HttpPart whose value is an ISO-8601 date-time.
HttpEntities
Standard predefined HTTP entities.
HttpEntityTagHeader
Base for single entity-tag headers.
HttpEntityTagsHeader
Base for multiple entity-tags headers.
HttpHeader
An HTTP header field: a name/value pair that appears in request or response messages.
HttpHeaderBean
Root concrete implementation of HttpHeader.
HttpHeaderList
A mutable, ordered list of HttpHeader instances.
HttpHeaderList.Void
Represents no header list in annotations.
HttpHeaders
Standard predefined HTTP headers.
HttpHeaders
Static factory methods for creating common HTTP headers.
HttpIntegerHeader
Base for integer headers.
HttpIntegerPart
An HttpPart whose value is an integer.
HttpLongHeader
Base for long headers.
HttpLongPart
An HttpPart whose value is a long integer.
HttpMediaRangesHeader
Base type for headers whose wire format is an Accept-style list of media ranges.
HttpMediaTypeHeader
Base type for headers whose value is a single MediaType (e.g.
HttpMethod
Represents valid HTTP 1.1 method name static strings per the RFC 2616 spec.
HttpPart
A name/value pair representing a single query parameter, form field, or path variable.
HttpPart
Represents an instance of an HTTP part.
HttpPartBean
Root concrete implementation of HttpPart.
HttpPartCollectionFormat
Valid values for the collectionFormat field.
HttpPartDataType
Valid values for the type field.
HttpPartFormat
Valid values for the format field.
HttpPartList
A mutable, ordered list of HttpPart instances.
HttpPartList.Void
Represents no part list in annotations.
HttpPartMarshalling
Specifies the HttpPartSerializer and HttpPartParser to use for serializing/parsing HTTP parts.
HttpPartParser
Interface used to convert HTTP headers, query parameters, form-data parameters, and URI path variables to POJOs
HttpPartParser.Creator
A creator for a part parser.
HttpPartParser.Void
Represent "no" part parser.
HttpPartParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of HttpPartParser.
HttpParts
Standard predefined HTTP parts.
HttpParts
Static factory methods for creating HTTP parts (query parameters, form fields, path variables).
HttpPartSchema
Represents an OpenAPI schema definition.
HttpPartSchema.Builder
Builder class.
HttpPartSerializer
Interface used to convert POJOs to simple strings in HTTP headers, query parameters, form-data parameters, and URI path variables.
HttpPartSerializer.Creator
A creator for a part serializer.
HttpPartSerializer.Void
Represent "no" part part serializer.
HttpPartSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of HttpPartSerializer.
HttpPartType
Represents possible enum values for HTTP part types.
HttpProtocolVersion
The HTTP protocol version that appears in request and response start lines (e.g.
HttpRequestLine
The first line of an HTTP request message, containing the method, request URI, and protocol version.
HttpRequestLineBean
Default immutable implementation of HttpRequestLine.
HttpResource
An extension of an HttpEntity that also includes arbitrary headers.
HttpResource
An HttpBody that carries additional headers (such as Content-Type, Content-Disposition, or Content-Language) alongside the body.
HttpResourceBean
Default immutable implementation of HttpResource: an HttpBody bundled with a set of associated headers (such as Content-Type, Content-Disposition, or Content-Language).
HttpResourceProcessor
Response handler for HttpResource objects.
HttpResources
Standard predefined HTTP resources.
HttpResponseMessage
A complete HTTP response message: status line, headers, and optional body.
HttpResponseProcessor
Response handler for HttpResponseMessage objects (transport-neutral replacement for HttpResponse).
HttpResponses
Standard predefined HTTP responses.
HttpResponses
Static factory methods for creating pre-defined HTTP response and exception objects.
HttpServletRequestArgs
Resolves method parameters on RestOp-annotated Java methods of types found on the HttpServletRequest object.
HttpServletResponseArgs
Resolves method parameters on RestOp-annotated Java methods of types found on the HttpServletResponse object.
HttpSessionArgs
Resolves method parameters on RestOp-annotated Java methods of types found on the HttpSession object.
HttpStatusLine
The first line of an HTTP response message, containing the protocol version, status code, and reason phrase.
HttpStatusLineBean
Default immutable implementation of HttpStatusLine.
HttpStringHeader
Base type for HTTP headers whose value is an opaque string (or lazy Supplier of string).
HttpStringPart
An HttpPart whose value is a string.
HttpStringRangesHeader
Base for comma-separated tokens with optional q-values.
HttpTransport
SPI for pluggable HTTP transports.
HttpTransportBuilder
A builder interface for configuring and creating HttpTransport instances.
HttpTransportProvider
ServiceLoader SPI for auto-discovering HttpTransport implementations on the classpath.
HttpUriHeader
Base for single-URI headers.
HttpUriPart
An HttpPart whose value is a URI.
HttpUtils
HTTP utilities.
HttpVersionNotSupported
Exception representing an HTTP 505 ().
HttpVersionNotSupported
Represents an HTTP 505 HTTP Version Not Supported error response.
Hyperlink
Defines a simple hyperlink class.
I
DTO for an HTML <i> element.
Icon
Represents a small icon image for visual identification of a feed.
Id
Represents a permanent, universally unique identifier for a feed or entry.
IdentityEncoder
Encoder for handling "identity" encoding and decoding.
IdTokenValidatorAdapter
Wraps Nimbus's IDTokenValidator to validate an OpenID Connect ID token's signature and claims and project the verified claims onto a Juneau ClaimsPrincipal.

Builder.

ImageSerializer

Implementation

IMUsed
Represents an HTTP 226 IM Used response.
IMUsed
Represents an HTTP 226 IM Used response.
Info
Provides metadata about the API.
Info
Provides metadata about the API.
InfoManager
Shared worker for the /info management endpoint: renders the running application's ManifestFile main attributes (build/version/git metadata) as a map.
InfoMixin
Mixin flavor of the /info endpoint: renders the running application's manifest (build/version/git metadata) resolved from the host bean store.
InfoResource
Child-resource flavor of the /info endpoint.
Inherit
Dummy class that indicates that serializers, parsers, or transforms should be inherited from parent-class-to-class or class-to-method.
Ini

InitializeResult

IniWriter
Specialized writer for serializing INI format.
Inject
Marks constructors, methods, fields, or parameters as injection points.
InMemorySessionStore
In-memory SessionStore backed by a bounded-LRU map, indexed by sub and sid so it can satisfy back-channel logout.
Input
DTO for an HTML <input> element.
InputStreamParser
Subclass of Parser for byte-based parsers.
InputStreamParser.Builder<SELF extends InputStreamParser.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
InputStreamParser.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed InputStreamParser.create() / Parser.copy() path.
InputStreamParserArg
Resolves method parameters of type InputStreamParser on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
InputStreamParserSession
Subclass of parser session objects for byte-based parsers.
InputStreamParserSession.Builder<SELF extends InputStreamParserSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
InputStreamParserSession.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
InputStreamProcessor
Response processor for InputStream objects.
InputStreamSwap
Transforms InputStreams to Strings.
InputStreamSwap.Base64
Converts InputStreams to BASE-64 encoding.
InputStreamSwap.Hex
Converts InputStreams to hex encoding.
InputStreamSwap.SpacedHex
Converts InputStreams to spaced-hex encoding.
Ins
DTO for an HTML <ins> element.
InsufficientStorage
Exception representing an HTTP 507 ().
InsufficientStorage
Represents an HTTP 507 Insufficient Storage error response.
IntegerAssertion
Used for assertion calls against integers.
IntegerHolder
A simple mutable integer value.
InternalServerError
Exception representing an HTTP 500 (Internal Server Error).
InternalServerError
Represents an HTTP 500 Internal Server Error error response.
Introspectable
Converter for enablement of ObjectIntrospector support on response objects returned by a @RestOp-annotated method.
InvalidAnnotationException
Defines an invalid usage of an annotation.
InvalidConversionException
Thrown by Converter.to(Object, Class) when no conversion path exists between two types.
InvalidDataConversionException
General invalid conversion exception.
IoUtils
Various I/O related utility methods.
Iso8601Utils
Centralized ISO 8601 formatting and parsing utility for date/time and Duration types.
Items
A limited subset of JSON-Schema's items object.
Items
A limited subset of JSON-Schema's items object.
Items
Swagger items annotation.
ItemsAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Items annotation.
ItemsAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
JavaHttpTransport
HttpTransport implementation backed by the JDK's built-in HttpClient.
JavaHttpTransportBuilder
Fluent builder for JavaHttpTransport.
JavaHttpTransportProvider
HttpTransportProvider implementation that supplies a JavaHttpTransport.
Jcs
A pairing of a JcsSerializer and JsonParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
JcsConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties for JcsSerializer.
JcsConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @JcsConfig annotation.
JcsConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies JcsConfig annotations to a JcsSerializer.Builder.
JcsSerializer
Serializes POJO models to canonical JSON per RFC 8785 (JCS).
JcsSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
JcsSerializerSession
Session object for JcsSerializer that produces RFC 8785 canonical JSON.
JcsSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
JcsWriter
JSON writer for JCS (RFC 8785) canonical output.
JettyConfiguration
@Configuration class that wires Jetty into a Microservice bootstrap.
JettyHttpTransport
HttpTransport implementation backed by Jetty 12 HttpClient.
JettyHttpTransportBuilder
Fluent builder for JettyHttpTransport.
JettyHttpTransportProvider
HttpTransportProvider implementation that supplies a JettyHttpTransport.
JettyLogger
Implementation of Jetty Logger based on Logger.
JettyMicroservice
Zero-config convenience launcher for a Jetty-backed Juneau microservice.
JettyServerComponent
Drives the Jetty server lifecycle on behalf of the microservice via the MicroserviceListener fan-out.
JettyServerFactory
Interface for creating Jetty servers.
JettySettings
Programmatic settings for the Jetty server contributed by JettyConfiguration.
JettySettings.Builder
Builder for JettySettings.
Json
Annotation for specifying various JSON options for the JSON serializers and parsers.
Json
A pairing of a JsonSerializer and JsonParser into a single class with convenience read/write methods.
Json5
A pairing of a Json5Serializer and Json5Parser into a single class with convenience read/write methods.
Json5l
Pairs Json5lSerializer and Json5lParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
Json5lConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties for REST classes and methods using JSON5L.
Json5lConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Json5lConfig annotation.
Json5lConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies Json5lConfig annotations to a JsonParser.Builder.
Json5lConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies Json5lConfig annotations to a JsonSerializer.Builder.
Json5List
JSON5-flavored MarshalledList.
Json5lParser
Parses JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) input into POJO models.
Json5lParser.Builder
Builder class.
Json5lParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of Json5lParser.
Json5lParserSession.Builder
Builder class.
Json5lSerializer
Serializes POJO models to JSON5L (JSON5 Lines).
Json5lSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
Json5lSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of Json5lSerializer.
Json5lSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
Json5lTokenReader
Reference implementation of the public TokenReader surface for the JSON5L format.
Json5Map
JSON5-flavored MarshalledMap.
Json5Parser
Parses any valid JSON text into a POJO model.
Json5Parser.Builder
Builder class.
Json5ParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of Json5Parser.
Json5ParserSession.Builder
Builder class.
Json5Serializer

Json5Serializer.Builder
Builder class.
Json5Serializer.Readable
Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode, with whitespace.
Json5SerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of Json5Serializer.

Builder class.
Json5TokenReader
Reference implementation of the public TokenReader surface for the JSON5 format.
JsonAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Json annotation.
JsonAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
JsonApiDocument
Represents the top-level JSON:API document as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Document Structure.
JsonApiError
Represents a JSON:API Error Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Error Objects.
JsonApiErrorSource
Represents the source sub-object of a JSON:API Error Object.
JsonApiLink
Represents a JSON:API Link Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Links.
JsonApiLinkOrStringSwap
Per-property ObjectSwap applied to JSON:API links maps so that each map entry round-trips as either a JSON string URL or a JsonApiLink JSON object per the spec.
JsonApiRelationship
Represents a JSON:API Relationship Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Relationships.
JsonApiResource
Represents a JSON:API Resource Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Resource Objects.
JsonApiResourceIdentifier
Represents a JSON:API Resource Identifier Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Resource Identifier Objects.
JsonApiVersion
Represents the JSON:API top-level jsonapi member.
JsonApply
Dynamically applies a @Json annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
JsonApply.Array
A collection of @JsonApply annotations.
JsonApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @JsonApply annotation.
JsonApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted JsonApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
JsonApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
JsonBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to the JSON serializers and parsers pulled from the @Json annotation on the bean property.
JsonClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to the JSON serializers and parsers pulled from the @Json annotation on the class.
JsonComplexExample
Sample class which shows the complex usage of JsonSerializer and JsonParser.
JsonConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in JsonSerializer and JsonParser.
JsonConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @JsonConfig annotation.
JsonConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies JsonConfig annotations to a JsonParser.Builder.
JsonConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies JsonConfig annotations to a JsonSerializer.Builder.
JsonConfigurationExample
Json configuration example.
JsonFormat
JSON format.
JsonFunctions
JSON-navigation functions for the #{...} script catalog.
JsonFunctions.Get
#{get(json, key)} — extracts json[key] (object) or json[index] (array, when key parses as int).
JsonFunctions.JsonPath
#{jsonPath(json, path)} / #{jsonPath(json, path, default)} — extracts a value via a slash-rooted path (e.g.
JsonFunctions.Keys
#{keys(json)} — returns a JSON-array-shortcut string of an object's keys.
JsonFunctions.Size
#{size(json)} — returns the count: object key count, array length, string length, or 0 for null/primitives.
JsonFunctions.Values
#{values(json)} — returns a JSON-array-shortcut string of an object's values (or array elements).
Jsonl
Pairs JsonlSerializer and JsonlParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
JsonlConfig

JsonlConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply

JsonLdParser

JsonLdSerializer
Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to JSON-LD format.
JsonList
Java implementation of a JSON array.
JsonlParser
Parses JSONL (JSON Lines) input into POJO models.
JsonlParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonlParser.

JsonlSerializer

JsonMap
Java implementation of a JSON object.
JsonMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to JsonClassMeta and JsonBeanPropertyMeta objects.
JsonParser
Parses any valid RFC 8259 JSON text into a POJO model.
JsonParser.Builder<SELF extends JsonParser.Builder<SELF>>

JsonParserSession

JsonPatch
Represents a JSON Patch document per RFC 6902.
JsonPatchOperation
Abstract base for a JSON Patch operation per RFC 6902.
JsonPointer
An RFC 6901 JSON Pointer that addresses a single value within a Map/List tree (such as the MarshalledMap/MarshalledList family).
JsonRpcError
JSON-RPC 2.0 error object.
JsonRpcRequest
JSON-RPC 2.0 request envelope.
JsonRpcResponse
JSON-RPC 2.0 success or error response envelope.
JsonSchema
Represents a top-level schema object bean in the JSON-Schema core specification.
JsonSchema
JSON Schema subset used by MCP tool inputSchema objects.
JsonSchema.BooleanOrSchemaArraySwap
Used during parsing to convert the additionalItems property to the correct class type.
JsonSchema.BooleanOrSchemaSwap
Used during parsing to convert the additionalProperties property to the correct class type.
JsonSchema.JsonSchemaOrSchemaArraySwap
Used during parsing to convert the items property to the correct class type.
JsonSchema.JsonTypeOrJsonTypeArraySwap
Used during parsing to convert the type property to the correct class type.
JsonSchemaArray
Represents a list of JsonSchema objects.
JsonSchemaBeanGenerator
Bridge for generating typed JsonSchema beans from Java types.
JsonSchemaBeanGenerator.Builder
Builder for JsonSchemaBeanGenerator.
JsonSchemaBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to the JSON-Schema pulled from the @Schema annotation on the bean property.
JsonSchemaClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to the JSON-Schema serializer and pulled from the @Schema annotation on the class.
JsonSchemaConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in JsonSchemaGenerator.
JsonSchemaConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @JsonSchemaConfig annotation.
JsonSchemaConfigAnnotation.Apply
Applies JsonSchemaConfig annotations to a JsonSchemaGenerator.Builder.
JsonSchemaGenerator

JsonSchemaGeneratorSession

Builder class.
JsonSchemaMap
A container for retrieving JSON JsonSchema objects by URI.
JsonSchemaMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to JsonSchemaClassMeta and JsonSchemaBeanPropertyMeta objects.
JsonSchemaProperty
Represents a JSON property in the JSON-Schema core specification.
JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray
Convenience class for representing a property that's an array of simple types.
JsonSchemaPropertyValidatorFactory
PropertyValidatorFactory implementation backed by the typed JsonSchema bean.
JsonSchemaRef
Convenience class for representing a schema reference such as "{'$ref':'/url/to/ref'}".
JsonSchemaSerializer
Serializes POJO metadata to HTTP responses as JSON-Schema.
JsonSchemaSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
JsonSchemaSerializer.Readable
Default serializer, with whitespace.
JsonSchemaSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonSchemaSerializer.

Builder class.
JsonSchemaValidator
Validates values against a JsonSchema bean per the JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 specification.
JsonSerializer
Serializes POJO models to RFC 8259 JSON.
JsonSerializer.Builder<SELF extends JsonSerializer.Builder<SELF>>

JsonSerializer.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed JsonSerializer.create() / JsonSerializer.copy() path.

Default serializer, with whitespace.

Sample class which shows the simple usage of JsonSerializer and JsonParser.
JsonTokenReader
Reference implementation of the public TokenReader surface for the JSON format.
JsonTokenReader.Settings
Cursor-level settings honored by JsonTokenReader.
JsonTokenWriter
Reference implementation of the public TokenWriter surface for the JSON format.
JsonTokenWriter.Settings
Output-formatting settings honored by JsonTokenWriter.
JsonType
Represents possible JSON types in the JSON-Schema core specification.
JsonTypeArray
Represents a list of JsonType objects.
JsonWriter
Specialized writer for serializing JSON.
JspDispatcher
Flavor-neutral worker bean carrying the JSP raw-template-dispatch logic shared by the JspMixin mixin, the JspServlet servlet, and the JspResource child flavors.
JspDispatcher.Builder
Builder for JspDispatcher.
JspMixin
Mixin that wires JSP view-rendering onto any Juneau REST resource.
JspMixin.Builder
Builder for JspMixin.
JspResource
Child-resource flavor of the JspMixin mixin.
JspServlet
Standalone servlet companion of the JspMixin mixin.
JspView
Immutable value class returned from @RestOp-annotated methods to ask the framework to render a JSP template.
JspViewRenderer
ResponseProcessor that detects JspView-typed return values and dispatches them to the underlying JSP engine via ServletContext.getRequestDispatcher(...).forward(...).
JsrSupport
FQN-based support for JSR-style annotation detection.
JulLogBackend
LogBackend implementation for java.util.logging (JUL).
JuneauBeanStoreExtension
JUnit 5 extension that discovers @TestBean-annotated members on a test class and exposes them as a TestBeanStore overlay.
JuneauBeanStoreExtension.OverrideSet
The flattened result of JuneauBeanStoreExtension.discoverOverrides(Object): the @TestBean overlay store, the unified Mode of all declarations, and whether any were found.
JuneauRestAutoConfiguration
Opt-in Spring Boot auto-configuration that mounts every RestServlet bean at its self-declared top-level path without an explicit ServletRegistrationBean per servlet.
JuneauRestServletContainerInitializer
Plain Servlet-spec ServletContainerInitializer that auto-mounts RestServlet subclasses at their self-declared top-level paths in non-Spring (e.g.
JuneauServletRegistrations
Always-available factory helper that builds a Spring Boot ServletRegistrationBean whose URL mappings are derived from a Juneau servlet's self-declared top-level paths.
JwtTokenValidator
TokenValidator that validates signed JWTs against a JWKS-backed key source.
JwtTokenValidator.Builder
Builder class for JwtTokenValidator.
Kbd
DTO for an HTML <kbd> element.
Keygen
DTO for an HTML <keygen> element.
KeywordSet
A specialized set for storing and efficiently looking up language keywords.
Label
DTO for an HTML <label> element.
LastModified

Link

DTO for an HTML <link> element.
Link
The Link object represents a possible design-time link for a response.
LinkString
Simple bean that implements a hyperlink for the HTML serializer.
ListAssertion<E>
Used for assertion calls against lists.
ListBeanChannel<T>
A simple in-memory BeanChannel implementation backed by an ArrayList.
Listifier<T>
Functional interface for converting collection-like objects to standardized List<Object> format.
Listifiers
Collection of standard listifier implementations for the Bean-Centric Testing framework.
ListOperation
Identifies how to add elements to a list.
ListPromptsResult
Result payload for "prompts/list".
ListResourcesResult
Result payload for "resources/list".
Lists<E>
A fluent builder for constructing List instances with various configuration options.
ListToolsResult
Result payload for "tools/list".
LoadConfigResource
REST resource for loading configuration from a Git repository.
LocalDir
Represents a directory that can be located either on the classpath or in the file system.
LocaleFormat
Supported wire formats for Locale values.
LocalFile
Represents a file that can be located either on the classpath or in the file system.
LocalizationVar
Localized string variable resolver.
Location
Represents a parsed Location HTTP response header.
Location
 
Locked
Exception representing an HTTP 423 (Locked).
Locked
Represents an HTTP 423 Locked error response.
Log4j2LogBackend
LogBackend adapter for Apache Log4j 2, for use behind the /loggers management endpoint.
LogBackend
SPI behind the /loggers management endpoint: reads and sets logger levels for one concrete logging backend at runtime.
LogbackLogBackend
LogBackend adapter for Logback (the SLF4J native backend), for use behind the /loggers management endpoint.
LogConfig
Can be used for configuration of simple logging in the microservice.
LogEntryFormatter
Log entry formatter.
Logger
Extended logger that provides convenience methods for logging formatted messages.
LoggersManager
Shared worker for the /loggers management endpoint: reads and sets logger levels at runtime by delegating to the LogBackend resolved from the host context.
LoggersMixin
Mixin flavor of the /loggers runtime log-level management endpoint.
LoggersResource
Child-resource flavor of the /loggers runtime log-level management endpoint.
LoggersSettings
Exposure settings for the /loggers endpoint.
LoggersSettings.Builder
Builder for LoggersSettings.
LoggingCapability
Server logging capability marker (structure may grow with the spec).
Logo
Represents a larger logo image for visual identification of a feed.
LogParser
Utility class for reading log files.
LogRecord
LogRecord that supports lazy message formatting.
LogRecordCapture
Captures log records for testing purposes.
LogRecordListener
Interface for listening to log records.
LogsResource
REST resource for viewing and accessing log files.
LogsResource.Action
File action link.
LogsResource.FileResource
File or directory details for REST response.
LongAssertion
Used for assertion calls against longs.
LongHolder
A simple mutable long value.
LoopDetected
Exception representing an HTTP 508 (Loop Detected).
LoopDetected
Represents an HTTP 508 Loop Detected error response.
Main

ManifestFile

ManifestFilePropertySource
Property source backed by ManifestFile.
ManifestFilePropertySourceProvider

ManifestFileVar

Maps<K,V>
A fluent builder for constructing Map instances with various configuration options.
MapStore
A writable PropertyStore implementation backed by a thread-safe map.
MapSwap<T>

MapVar
A subclass of DefaultingVar that simply pulls values from a Map.
Mark
DTO for an HTML <mark> element.

Applies MarshalledConfig annotations to a MarshallingContext.Builder.
MarshalledFilter

MarshalledIgnore
Skip a type entirely during marshalling.
MarshalledIgnoreAnnotation

MarshalledIgnoreApply
Dynamically applies a @MarshalledIgnore annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
MarshalledIgnoreApply.Array

MarshalledIgnoreApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted MarshalledIgnoreApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
MarshalledIgnoreApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
MarshalledList
Neutral, marshaller-agnostic list of objects.
MarshalledMap
Neutral, marshaller-agnostic map of string-to-object entries.
MarshalledNode
Typed tree façade over the generic-collections model (MarshalledMap / MarshalledList and their JsonMap / JsonList subclasses).
MarshalledProp
Used to tailor how bean properties get marshalled by the framework.
MarshalledPropAnnotation

MarshallingContext

Builder class.
MarshallingContextable
Context class for classes that use MarshallingContext objects.
MarshallingContextable.Builder<SELF extends MarshallingContextable.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
MarshallingContextConverter
Generic object converter implementation.
MarshallingDefMapper
Interface used to retrieve identifiers and URIs for bean classes.
MarshallingDefMapper.Void
Represents the absence of a bean definition mapper class.
MarshallingRecursionException
Exception that indicates that a recursion was detected while traversing a POJO model.
MarshallingSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of MarshallingContext.
MarshallingSession.Builder<SELF extends MarshallingSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
MarshallingSession.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
MarshallingStringSwap<T>
Transforms beans into Strings by simply calling the Object.toString() method.
MarshallingTraverseContext
Parent class for all classes that traverse POJOs.
MarshallingTraverseContext.Builder<SELF extends MarshallingTraverseContext.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
MarshallingTraverseSession
ContextSession that lives for the duration of a single use of MarshallingTraverseContext.
MarshallingTraverseSession.Builder<SELF extends MarshallingTraverseSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
MarshallUtils
Convenience static methods for serializing objects with all supported Juneau marshalling formats.
MatcherFactory
Common interface for matchers used by the ObjectSearcher class.
MatchResultSwap
Transforms MatchResults to List objects.
MaxForwards
Represents a parsed Max-Forwards HTTP request header.
MaxForwards
 
Mcp
Static façade over McpDispatcher for embedders that want a single-line dispatch call.
McpCursor
Pagination strategy for MCP list dispatchers (tools / prompts / resources).
McpDispatcher
Transport-agnostic JSON-RPC dispatcher for the MCP wire protocol.
McpEndpoint
Mixin interface that exposes an MCP JSON-RPC endpoint at POST /mcp on any Juneau REST resource.
McpException
Runtime exception carrying JSON-RPC error fields for mapping to JsonRpcError.
McpMethods
JSON-RPC method names used by MCP over HTTP.
McpPage<T>
Slice of MCP descriptors returned by McpCursor.page(List, String, org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.BeanStore).
McpPromptHandler
Handler for a single MCP prompt.
McpProtocol
MCP protocol version strings carried in initialize requests and results.
McpResourceHandler
Handler for a single MCP resource.
McpRestServlet
Drop-in BasicRestServlet subclass that exposes a single MCP JSON-RPC endpoint at POST /.
McpServerConfig
Aggregate configuration consumed by McpDispatcher.
McpToolHandler
Handler for a single MCP tool.
McpTypedHandlers
Adapters that convert McpTypedToolHandler / McpTypedPromptHandler into the raw McpToolHandler / McpPromptHandler interfaces consumed by McpDispatcher.
McpTypedPromptHandler<A>
Typed variant of McpPromptHandler where MCP prompts/get arguments bind into a Juneau bean.
McpTypedToolHandler<A,R>
Typed variant of McpToolHandler where MCP tools/call arguments bind into a Juneau bean.
MdcAsyncListener
Bridges SLF4J MDC context from the request (dispatch) thread to the CompletableFuture completion thread.
MediaRange
Describes a single type used in content negotiation between an HTTP client and server, as described in Section 14.1 and 14.7 of RFC2616 (the HTTP/1.1 specification).
MediaRanges
A parsed Accept or similar header value.
MediaType
Provides schema and examples for the media type identified by its key.
MediaType
Describes a single media type used in content negotiation between an HTTP client and server, as described in Section 14.1 and 14.7 of RFC2616 (the HTTP/1.1 specification).
Memoizer<T>
A thread-safe supplier that caches the result of the first call and supports resetting the cache.
MemoryStore
Filesystem-based storage location for configuration files.
MemoryStore.Builder
Builder class.
MenuItemWidget
A subclass of widgets for rendering menu items with drop-down windows.
Messages
An enhanced ResourceBundle.
Messages.Builder
Builder class.
Meta
DTO for an HTML <meta> element.
Meter
DTO for an HTML <meter> element.
Method
Annotation that can be applied to a parameter of a @RestOp annotated method to identify it as the HTTP method.
MethodArg
Resolves method parameters annotated with Method on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
MethodExecStats
Method execution statistics.
MethodExecStats.Builder
Builder class.
MethodExecStore
Method execution statistics database.
MethodExecStore.Builder
Builder class.
MethodInfo
Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a Java method.
MethodInvoker
A wrapper around a Method.invoke(Object, Object...) method that allows for basic instrumentation.
MethodList
A simple list of Method objects.
MethodNotAllowed
Exception representing an HTTP 405 (Method Not Allowed).
MethodNotAllowed
Represents an HTTP 405 Method Not Allowed error response.
MetricsManager
Shared worker for the /metrics management endpoint: resolves a consumer-provided Micrometer MeterRegistry from the host bean store and renders a scrape payload.
MetricsMixin
Mixin flavor of the /metrics endpoint: renders a Prometheus scrape from a consumer-provided Micrometer MeterRegistry resolved from the host bean store.
MetricsRecorder
SPI for receiving per-request metric events from juneau-rest-server.
MetricsResource
Child-resource flavor of the /metrics endpoint.
MicrometerMetricsRecorder
MetricsRecorder bridge that records every @RestOp call as a Micrometer Timer sample on the configured MeterRegistry.
Microservice
Parent class for all microservices.
Microservice.Builder
Builder class.
MicroserviceExtension
JUnit 5 extension behind @MicroserviceTest: boots a whole Microservice (config + lifecycle + embedded Jetty on an ephemeral port) for the test class, with @TestBean mock-bean injection and convenience parameter resolution.
MicroserviceListener
Listener class for microservice lifecycle events.
MicroserviceTest
Boots a whole Microservice (config + lifecycle + embedded Jetty server) for the annotated JUnit 5 test class — the standalone-microservice analog of Spring's @SpringBootTest.
MimeTypeDetector
A lightweight MIME type detector that doesn't require Jakarta Activation.
MimeTypeDetector.Builder
Builder class for creating MimeTypeDetector instances.
MisdirectedRequest
Exception representing an HTTP 421 (Misdirected Request).
MisdirectedRequest
Represents an HTTP 421 Misdirected Request error response.
Mixin
Rich mixin definition for the @Rest(mixinDefs=...) attribute.
MixinAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Mixin annotation.
MixinAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
MockConsole
A capturing PrintStream that allows you to easily capture console output.
MockHttpSession
An implementation of HttpSession for mocking purposes.
MockHttpTransport
A programmable in-process HttpTransport for unit testing.
MockHttpTransport.Builder
Fluent builder for MockHttpTransport.
MockHttpTransport.RequestHandler
A handler that maps an incoming TransportRequest to a TransportResponse.
MockLogger
Simplified logger for intercepting and asserting logging messages.
MockPathResolver
Used to resolve incoming URLS to the various URL artifacts of HttpServletRequest.
MockRestClient
Mocked RestClient.
MockRestClient
Next-generation mock REST client that routes requests in-process to a Juneau RestContext.
MockRestClient.Builder
Builder class.
MockRestClient.Builder
Fluent builder for MockRestClient.
MockRestRequest
A subclass of RestRequest with additional features for mocked testing.
MockRestResponse
A subclass of RestResponse with additional features for mocked testing.
MockServletRequest
A mutable implementation of HttpServletRequest for mocking purposes.
MockServletResponse
An implementation of HttpServletResponse for mocking purposes.
Mod
Specifies an entry modifier that is used to encode during write and decode during read of config entries.
Mode
Wiring mode for a @TestBean-declared override.
MovedPermanently
Represents an HTTP 301 Moved Permanently response.
MovedPermanently
Represents an HTTP 301 Moved Permanently response.
MoveOp
The JSON Patch "move" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.4.
MsgPack
A pairing of a MsgPackSerializer and MsgPackParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
MsgPack
Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by MsgPackSerializer and MsgPackParser.
MsgPackAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @MsgPack annotation.
MsgPackAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
MsgPackApply
Dynamically applies a @MsgPack annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
MsgPackApply.Array
A collection of @MsgPackApply annotations.
MsgPackApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @MsgPackApply annotation.
MsgPackApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted MsgPackApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
MsgPackApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
MsgPackBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to the MessagePack serializers and parsers pulled from the @MsgPack annotation on the bean property.
MsgPackClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to the MessagePack serializers and parsers pulled from the @MsgPack annotation on the class.
MsgPackConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in MsgPackSerializer and MsgPackParser.
MsgPackConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @MsgPackConfig annotation.
MsgPackConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies MsgPackConfig annotations to a MsgPackParser.Builder.
MsgPackConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies MsgPackConfig annotations to a MsgPackSerializer.Builder.
MsgPackInputStream
Specialized input stream for parsing MessagePack streams.
MsgPackMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to MsgPackClassMeta and MsgPackBeanPropertyMeta objects.
MsgPackOutputStream
Specialized output stream for serializing MessagePack streams.
MsgPackParser
Parses a MessagePack stream into a POJO model.
MsgPackParser.Base64
Default parser, string input encoded as BASE64.
MsgPackParser.Builder
Builder class.
MsgPackParser.SpacedHex
Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex.
MsgPackParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of MsgPackParser.
MsgPackParserSession.Builder
Builder class.
MsgPackSerializer
Serializes POJO models to MessagePack.
MsgPackSerializer.Base64
Default serializer, BASE64 string output.
MsgPackSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
MsgPackSerializer.SpacedHex
Default serializer, spaced-hex string output.
MsgPackSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of MsgPackSerializer.
MsgPackSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
MsgPackTokenReader
Reference implementation of the public TokenReader surface for the MessagePack format.
MsgPackTokenWriter
Reference implementation of the public TokenWriter surface for the MessagePack format.
MsgPackTokenWriter.Settings
Cursor-level settings honored by MsgPackTokenWriter.
MultiList<E>
A composite list that presents multiple lists as a single unified list.
MultiMap<K,V>
A composite map that presents multiple maps as a single unified map.
Multipart
REST proxy method-level multipart/form-data marker annotation.
MultipartBody
An HttpBody that serializes a multipart/form-data message (RFC 7578).
MultipartBody.Builder
Fluent builder for MultipartBody.
MultipartBody.MultipartPart
A single part within a MultipartBody.
MultipartFormDataMatcher
Predefined matcher for matching requests with content type "multipart/form-data".
MultipartResolvingVar
Interface for the resolution of vars that can have one or more keys where the first non-null resolution is returned.
MultipartVar
Interface for the resolution of vars that consist of a comma-delimited list.
MultipleChoices
Represents an HTTP 300 Multiple Choices response.
MultipleChoices
Represents an HTTP 300 Multiple Choices response.
MultiSet<E>
A composite set that presents multiple collections as a single unified set.
MultiStatus
Represents an HTTP 207 Multi-Status response.
MultiStatus
Represents an HTTP 207 Multi-Status response.
MustacheDispatcher
Flavor-neutral worker bean carrying the Mustache raw-template-dispatch logic shared by the MustacheMixin mixin, the MustacheServlet servlet, and the MustacheResource child flavors.
MustacheDispatcher.Builder
Builder for MustacheDispatcher.
MustacheMixin
Mixin that wires Mustache view-rendering onto any Juneau REST resource.
MustacheMixin.Builder
Builder for MustacheMixin.
MustacheResource
Child-resource flavor of the MustacheMixin mixin.
MustacheServlet
Standalone servlet companion of the MustacheMixin mixin.
MustacheView
Immutable value class returned from @RestOp-annotated methods to ask the framework to render a Mustache template.
MustacheViewRenderer
ResponseProcessor that detects MustacheView-typed return values and asks the configured MustacheFactory to render them directly onto the response writer.
N3
A pairing of a N3Serializer and N3Parser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
N3Parser
Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N3 (Notation3) into POJOs.
N3Serializer
Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N3 (Notation3) format.
Name
Specifies the parameter name for bean property mapping.
Named
Identifies a bean-injection qualifier for constructor/method parameters and fields.
NamedAttribute
A simple named object.
NamedAttributeMap
A list of NamedAttribute objects.
NameProperty
Identifies a setter method or field for setting the name of a POJO as it's known by its parent object.
NamePropertyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @NameProperty annotation.
NamePropertyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
NamePropertyApply
Dynamically applies a @NameProperty annotation to specified methods or fields.
NamePropertyApply.Array
A collection of @NamePropertyApply annotations.
NamePropertyApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @NamePropertyApply annotation.
NamePropertyApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted NamePropertyApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
NamePropertyApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
Namespace
Represents a simple namespace mapping between a simple name and URI.
NameValuePair
A name/value pair parameter, typically used in HTTP headers and request parameters.
NameValuePairable
Identifies a class that can be converted to a NameValuePair object.
Nav
DTO for an HTML <nav> element.
NavigationMixin
Mixin providing the group-navigation endpoint ([GET /]) that lists the host resource's child resources.
NetworkAuthenticationRequired
Exception representing an HTTP 511 (Network Authentication Required).
NetworkAuthenticationRequired
Represents an HTTP 511 Network Authentication Required error response.
NoCloseOutputStream
A wrapper around an OutputStream that prevents the underlying stream from being closed.
NoCloseWriter
A wrapper around a Writer that prevents the underlying writer from being closed.
NoContent
Represents an HTTP 204 No Content response.
NoContent
Represents an HTTP 204 No Content response.
NonAuthoritativeInformation
Represents an HTTP 203 Non-Authoritative Information response.
NonAuthoritiveInformation
Represents an HTTP 203 Non-Authoritative Information response.
None
Dummy class that indicates that serializers, parsers, or transforms for a Java class or method should not be inherited.
NoOpMetricsRecorder
Default MetricsRecorder implementation that drops every event on the floor.
NoOpTracerHook
Default TracerHook implementation that opens no spans and records nothing.
NoOpTracerHook.NoOpScope
No-op Scope returned by NoOpTracerHook.
Noscript
DTO for an HTML <noscript> element.
NotAcceptable
Exception representing an HTTP 406 (Not Acceptable).
NotAcceptable
Represents an HTTP 406 Not Acceptable error response.
NotExtended
Exception representing an HTTP 510 (Not Extended).
NotExtended
Represents an HTTP 510 Not Extended error response.
NotFound
Exception representing an HTTP 404 (Not Found).
NotFound
Represents an HTTP 404 Not Found error response.
NotImplemented
Exception representing an HTTP 501 (Not Implemented).
NotImplemented
Represents an HTTP 501 Not Implemented error response.
NotModified
Represents an HTTP 304 Not Modified response.
NotModified
Represents an HTTP 304 Not Modified response.
NoTrace
Represents a parsed No-Trace HTTP request header.
NoTrace
 
NQuads
A pairing of a NQuadsSerializer and NQuadsParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
NQuadsParser
Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N-Quads into POJOs.
NQuadsSerializer
Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N-Quads format.
NTriple
A pairing of a NTripleSerializer and NTripleParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
NTripleParser
Subclass of RdfParser for parsing N-Triples into POJOs.
NTripleSerializer
Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to N-Triples notation.
NullableReference<V>
A thread-safe reference that combines AtomicReference with Optional-like functionality.
NullableSupplier<T>
A Supplier whose value may be null, with Optional-like null-safe query methods.
Nulls
Per-property null-coercion modes consulted by parsers when an explicit null (or absent Optional) is encountered on the wire.
NumberMatcherFactory
Number matcher factory for the ObjectSearcher class.
OapiExample
Sample class which shows the simple usage of OpenApiSerializer.
OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow
Authorization-code grant (RFC 6749 §4.1) flow helper with mandatory PKCE per RFC 7636.
OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow.Builder
Builder.
OAuthClientCredentialsFlow
Client-credentials grant (RFC 6749 §4.4) flow helper.
OAuthClientCredentialsFlow.Builder
Builder.
OAuthFilter
AuthFilter that authenticates requests carrying an OAuth 2.0 / OIDC access token via the standard RFC 6750 Bearer Token scheme.
OAuthFilter.Builder
Builder.
OAuthFlow
Configuration details for a supported OAuth Flow.
OAuthFlowException
Runtime exception thrown by any OAuth flow helper when the IdP rejects the request, the HTTP round-trip fails, or the response can't be parsed.
OAuthFlows
Allows configuration of the supported OAuth Flows.
OAuthIntrospectionValidator
TokenValidator that validates opaque OAuth 2.0 access tokens via the RFC 7662 Token Introspection endpoint.
OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder
Builder for OAuthIntrospectionValidator.
OAuthRefreshTokenFlow
Refresh-token grant (RFC 6749 §6) flow helper.
OAuthRefreshTokenFlow.Builder
Builder.
OAuthResourceOwnerFlow
Deprecated.
Use OAuthAuthorizationCodeFlow (with PKCE) wherever possible.
OAuthResourceOwnerFlow.Builder
Deprecated.
OAuthToken
Immutable record returned by every OAuth 2.0 flow helper on a successful token acquisition.
Object_
DTO for an HTML <object> element.
ObjectAssertion<T>
Used for assertion calls against arbitrary POJOs.
ObjectIntrospector
POJO method introspector.
ObjectMerger
POJO merger.
ObjectPaginator
POJO model paginator.
ObjectSearcher
POJO model searcher.
ObjectSorter
POJO model sorter.
ObjectSwap<T,S>
Used to swap out non-serializable objects with serializable replacements during serialization, and vis-versa during parsing.
ObjectTool<T>
Interface for classes that convert POJOs in some way using some predefined arguments object.
ObjectViewer
POJO model viewer.
Observation
Handle to one in-flight custom (non-request) observation.
Observations
Static facade over an explicitly-installed default Observer for ergonomic custom (non-request) observations.
Observer
Factory for custom (non-request) Observations, composing a MetricsRecorder and a TracerHook.
OidcDiscoveryClient
Fetches a Juneau-native OidcMetadata record from an OpenID Connect provider's /.well-known/openid-configuration document.
OidcDiscoveryClient.Builder
Builder.
OidcDiscoveryException
Thrown by OidcDiscoveryClient.discover() when the IdP returns metadata that cannot be parsed.
OidcMetadata
Immutable record produced by OidcDiscoveryClient carrying the metadata fields a Juneau OAuth / OIDC consumer typically needs.
OidcRelyingParty
Facade orchestrating an OpenID Connect Authorization-Code-with-PKCE Relying Party login flow on top of the juneau-rest-server-auth-oauth building blocks.
OidcRelyingParty.Builder
Builder.
OidcSession
Immutable record describing a logged-in OpenID Connect Relying Party session.
OidcSessionAuthFilter
AuthFilter that resolves the OIDC Relying Party session cookie into a ClaimsPrincipal on each request, so RoleBasedRestGuard and @Auth Principal injection see the filter-resolved identity (via AuthenticatedRequestWrapper) with zero downstream changes.
Ok
Represents an HTTP 200 OK response.
Ok
Represents an HTTP 200 OK response.
OkHttpTransport
HttpTransport implementation backed by OkHttp 5.x.
OkHttpTransportBuilder
Fluent builder for OkHttpTransport.
OkHttpTransportProvider
HttpTransportProvider implementation that supplies an OkHttpTransport.
Ol
DTO for an HTML <ol> element.
OneLineFormat
One-line format.
OpenApi
This is the root document object for the OpenAPI specification.
OpenApi
A pairing of a OpenApiSerializer and OpenApiParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
OpenApi
Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by OpenApiSerializer and OpenApiParser.
OpenApiAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @OpenApi annotation.
OpenApiAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
OpenApiApply
Dynamically applies a @OpenApi annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
OpenApiApply.Array
A collection of @OpenApiApply annotations.
OpenApiApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @OpenApiApply annotation.
OpenApiApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted OpenApiApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
OpenApiApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
OpenApiBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to the OpenAPI serializers and parsers pulled from the @OpenApi annotation on the bean property.
OpenApiBuilder
Various useful static methods for creating OpenAPI elements.
OpenApiClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to the OpenApi serializers and parsers pulled from the @OpenApi annotation on the class.
OpenApiConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in MsgPackSerializer and MsgPackParser.
OpenApiConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @OpenApiConfig annotation.
OpenApiConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies OpenApiConfig annotations to a OpenApiParser.Builder.
OpenApiConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies OpenApiConfig annotations to a OpenApiSerializer.Builder.
OpenApiElement
Root class for all Swagger beans.
OpenApiMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to OpenApiClassMeta and OpenApiBeanPropertyMeta objects.
OpenApiMixin
Mixin that publishes the OpenAPI 3.1 spec endpoints for a resource.
OpenApiParser
OpenAPI part parser.
OpenApiParser.Builder
Builder class.
OpenApiParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of OpenApiParser.
OpenApiParserSession.Builder
Builder class.
OpenApiProvider
Interface for retrieving an OpenApi 3.1 document from a REST resource.
OpenApiProvider.Builder
Builder class for OpenApiProvider instances.
OpenApiProvider.Void
Represents no OpenApiProvider.
OpenApiResource
Wrapper bean for the resource class associated with an OpenAPI provider.
OpenApiSerializer
Serializes POJOs to values suitable for transmission as HTTP headers, query/form-data parameters, and path variables.
OpenApiSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
OpenApiSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of OpenApiSerializer.
OpenApiSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
OpenApiUI
Generates an OpenAPI-UI interface from an OpenAPI document.
OpenApiVar
OpenAPI 3.1 attribute variable resolver — sibling of SwaggerVar for the OpenAPI 3.1 path.
Operation
Describes a single API operation on a path.
Operation
Describes a single API operation on a path.
OperationMap
Map meant for method-name/operation mappings.
OpSwagger
Extended annotation for RestOp.swagger().
OpSwaggerAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @OpSwagger annotation.
OpSwaggerAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
Optgroup
DTO for an HTML <optgroup> element.
Option
DTO for an HTML <option> element.
Order
Ordering hint for beans where lower values have higher precedence.
Order
Order domain bean.
OrderStatus
Lifecycle status of an Order.
Origin
Represents a parsed Origin HTTP request header.
Origin
Represents an HTTP Origin header.
OtelTracerHook
TracerHook bridge that opens an OpenTelemetry Span for every @RestOp call.
Output
DTO for an HTML <output> element.
OutputStreamSerializer
Subclass of Serializer for byte-based serializers.
OutputStreamSerializer.Builder<SELF extends OutputStreamSerializer.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
OutputStreamSerializer.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed OutputStreamSerializer.create() / Serializer.copy() path.
OutputStreamSerializerSession
Subclass of SerializerSession for stream-based serializers.
OutputStreamSerializerSession.Builder<SELF extends OutputStreamSerializerSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
OutputStreamSerializerSession.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
P
DTO for an HTML <p> element.
PackageInfo
Lightweight wrapper around a Package object providing convenient access to package metadata and annotations.
PageArgs
Arguments passed to ObjectPaginator.
Param
DTO for an HTML <param> element.
Parameter
Describes a single operation parameter.
ParameterInfo
Describes a single operation parameter.
ParameterInfo
Lightweight utility class for introspecting information about a method or constructor parameter.
ParameterType
Static strings used for Swagger parameter types.
ParamFormat
Identifies the possible values for the UonSerializer.Builder.paramFormat(ParamFormat) setting.
ParentProperty
Identifies a setter method or field for adding a parent reference to a child object.
ParentPropertyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @ParentProperty annotation.
ParentPropertyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
ParentPropertyApply
Dynamically applies a @ParentProperty annotation to specified methods or fields.
ParentPropertyApply.Array
A collection of @ParentPropertyApply annotations.
ParentPropertyApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @ParentPropertyApply annotation.
ParentPropertyApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted ParentPropertyApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
ParentPropertyApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
Parquet
A pairing of ParquetSerializer and ParquetParser for Apache Parquet binary format.
Parquet
Annotation for customizing Parquet serialization of types and properties.
ParquetAnnotation
Utility classes for the @Parquet annotation.
ParquetApply
Dynamically applies a @Parquet annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
ParquetApply.Array
A collection of @ParquetApply annotations.
ParquetApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @ParquetApply annotation.
ParquetApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted ParquetApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
ParquetApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
ParquetBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to Parquet serializers and parsers.
ParquetClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to Parquet serializers and parsers.
ParquetConfig
Annotation for configuring Parquet serializer/parser on classes and methods.
ParquetConfigAnnotation
Utility classes for the @ParquetConfig annotation.
ParquetConfigAnnotation.Array
A collection of @ParquetConfig annotations.
ParquetConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies ParquetConfig annotations to a ParquetParser.Builder.
ParquetConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies ParquetConfig annotations to a ParquetSerializer.Builder.
ParquetCycleHandling
How to handle cyclic references when serializing to Parquet.
ParquetMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to ParquetClassMeta and ParquetBeanPropertyMeta objects.
ParquetParser
Parses Apache Parquet binary data into bean collections.
ParquetParser.Builder
Builder class.
ParquetParserSession
Session for ParquetParser.
ParquetParserSession.Builder
Builder for parser sessions.
ParquetSchemaBuilder
Builds Parquet schema (list of SchemaElement) from Juneau bean ClassMeta.
ParquetSchemaElement
A Parquet schema element representing a field in the Parquet schema.
ParquetSerializer
Serializes bean collections to Apache Parquet binary format.
ParquetSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
ParquetSerializerSession
Session for ParquetSerializer.
ParquetSerializerSession.Builder
Builder for serializer sessions.
ParquetSerializerSession.ValueHolder
Simple bean for wrapping non-bean values (Map is not convertible to BeanMap).
ParsedReaderSwap
Transforms the contents of a Reader into an Object.
ParsedReaderSwap.Html
Reader transform for reading HTML text.
ParsedReaderSwap.Json
Reader transform for reading JSON text.
ParsedReaderSwap.PlainText
Reader transform for reading plain text.
ParsedReaderSwap.Uon
Reader transform for reading plain text.
ParsedReaderSwap.UrlEncoding
Reader transform for reading plain text.
ParsedReaderSwap.Xml
Reader transform for reading XML text.
ParseException
Exception that indicates invalid syntax encountered during parsing.
Parser
Parent class for all Juneau parsers.
Parser.Builder<SELF extends Parser.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
Parser.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed Parser.create() / Parser.copy() path.
Parser.Null
Represents no Parser.
ParserArg
Resolves method parameters of type Parser on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
ParserConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in Parser, InputStreamParser, and ReaderParser.
ParserConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @ParserConfig annotation.
ParserConfigAnnotation.InputStreamParserApply
Applies ParserConfig annotations to a InputStreamParser.Builder.
ParserConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies ParserConfig annotations to a Parser.Builder.
ParserConfigAnnotation.ReaderParserApply
Applies ParserConfig annotations to a ReaderParser.Builder.
ParserInputStream
Input stream meant to be used as input for stream-based parsers.
ParserListener
Class for listening for certain parse events during a document parse.
ParserListener.Void
Represents no parser listener.
ParserMatch
Represents a parser and media type that matches an HTTP Content-Type header value.
ParserPipe
A wrapper around an object that a parser reads its input from.
ParserReader
Similar to a PushbackReader with a pushback buffer of 1 character.
ParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of Parser.
ParserSession.Builder<SELF extends ParserSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
ParserSession.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
ParserSet
Represents a group of Parsers that can be looked up by media type.
ParserSet.Builder
Builder class.
ParserSet.Inherit
An identifier that the previous entries in this group should be inherited.
ParserSet.NoInherit
An identifier that the previous entries in this group should not be inherited.
Part
REST request multipart/form-data part annotation.
PartBeanMeta<T>
Holds metadata about http part beans (POJOs that get serialized as HTTP parts such as form data or query parameters).
PartialContent
Represents an HTTP 206 Partial Content response.
PartialContent
Represents an HTTP 206 Partial Content response.
PartIterator
A type-safe iterator for NameValuePair objects.
PartList
An simple list of HTTP parts (form-data, query-parameters, path-parameters).
PartList
An ordered, immutable list of HttpPart instances that also implements HttpBody for URL-encoded form submission.
PartList.Void
Represents no part list in annotations.
Path
REST request path annotation.
PathArg
Resolves method parameters and parameter types annotated with Path on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
PathItem
Describes the operations available on a single path.
PathReaderBuilder
A fluent builder for creating Reader instances from Path objects with configurable character encoding.
PathRemainder
REST request path remainder annotation.
PathRemainderArg
Resolves method parameters annotated with PathRemainder on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
PathTraversal
Traversal engine for performing standard REST operations (GET, PUT, POST, DELETE) against nodes in a POJO model.
PathTraversalException
Generic exception thrown from the PathTraversal class.
PatternException
Indicates an invalid search pattern was specified.
PayloadTooLarge
Exception representing an HTTP 413 (Payload Too Large).
PayloadTooLarge
Represents an HTTP 413 Payload Too Large error response.
PeriodFormat
Supported wire formats for Period values.
PermanentRedirect
Represents an HTTP 308 Permanent Redirect response.
PermanentRedirect
Represents an HTTP 308 Permanent Redirect response.
Person
Represents a person, corporation, or similar entity in an Atom document.
Pet
Pet domain bean.
PetFreemarkerViewResource
Petstore FreeMarker view demo.
PetMustacheViewResource
Petstore Mustache view demo.
PetSecureResource
Secure analogue of PetStoreResource demonstrating Juneau's BearerTokenGuard + StubBearerTokenValidator pattern.
PetStatus
Lifecycle status of a Pet.
PetStore
In-memory Pet/Order/User store seeded from classpath JSON.
PetstoreNotFoundException
Thrown by PetStore when the requested entity does not exist.
PetStoreResource
Petstore CRUD REST resource.
PetstoreUiResource
Petstore React SPA demo — serves the no-build single-page React UI from the core classpath.
PlainText
A pairing of a PlainTextSerializer and PlainTextParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
PlainText
Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by PlainTextSerializer and PlainTextParser.
PlainTextAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @PlainText annotation.
PlainTextAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
PlainTextApply
Dynamically applies a @PlainText annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
PlainTextApply.Array
A collection of @PlainTextApply annotations.
PlainTextApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @PlainTextApply annotation.
PlainTextApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted PlainTextApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
PlainTextApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
PlainTextBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to the PlainText serializers and parsers pulled from the @PlainText annotation on the bean property.
PlainTextClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to the PlainText serializers and parsers pulled from the @PlainText annotation on the class.
PlainTextConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in PlainTextSerializer and PlainTextParser.
PlainTextConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @PlainTextConfig annotation.
PlainTextConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies PlainTextConfig annotations to a PlainTextParser.Builder.
PlainTextConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies PlainTextConfig annotations to a PlainTextSerializer.Builder.
PlainTextMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to PlainTextClassMeta and PlainTextBeanPropertyMeta objects.
PlainTextParser
Parsers HTTP plain text request bodies into Group 5 POJOs.
PlainTextParser.Builder
Builder class.
PlainTextParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of PlainTextParser.
PlainTextParserSession.Builder
Builder class.
PlainTextPojoProcessor
Response handler for plain-old Java objects when a serializer match is not found and they're asking for plain/text or anything.
PlainTextSerializer
Serializes POJOs to plain text using just the toString() method on the serialized object.
PlainTextSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
PlainTextSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of PlainTextSerializer.
PlainTextSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
Pojo
Sample pojo class.
PojoComplex
Complex Pojo class.
PojoWalker
Format-neutral POJO walker that re-emits an arbitrary object graph through a TokenWriter.
PojoWalker.Options
Databind-level settings honored by PojoWalker.
Position
Identifies a position in a reader or input stream.
Positionable
Interface for objects with positions (lines/columns/byte-positions for example).
PostConstruct
Marks a no-arg lifecycle callback invoked after dependency injection.
PoweredByApache
Widget that places a powered-by-Apache message on the page.
PoweredByJuneau
Widget that places a powered-by-Juneau message on the page.
Pragma
Represents a parsed Pragma HTTP request/response header.
Pragma
Represents an HTTP Pragma header.
Pre
DTO for an HTML <pre> element.
PreconditionFailed
Exception representing an HTTP 412 (Precondition Failed).
PreconditionFailed
Represents an HTTP 412 Precondition Failed error response.
PreconditionRequired
Exception representing an HTTP 428 (Precondition Required).
PreconditionRequired
Represents an HTTP 428 Precondition Required error response.
PreDestroy
Marks a no-arg lifecycle callback invoked during store shutdown.
PredicateUtils
Utility methods for composing Predicate instances.
Primary
Marks a bean contribution as preferred when multiple candidates exist.
PrimitiveArrayAssertion<E,T>
Used for assertion calls against arrays.
Problem
RFC 7807 — Problem Details for HTTP APIs bean.
ProblemAdapters
Static adapters that convert Juneau HTTP error types into RFC 7807 Problem beans.
ProblemDetailsProcessor
Response processor that serializes RFC 7807 / 9457 Problem payloads as application/problem+json.
ProblemException
A RuntimeException that carries an RFC 7807 Problem payload.
ProblemLocalizationStrategy
SPI seam for locale-aware translation of Problem.getTitle() / Problem.getDetail() (and any other human-readable fields) before serialization.
ProblemMapper<T extends Throwable>
SPI for mapping a domain or framework Throwable into an RFC 7807 / 9457 Problem bean.
ProblemMapperList
Aggregator bean for registering multiple ProblemMappers with a single bean-store entry.
Processing
Represents an HTTP 102 Processing response.
Processing
Represents an HTTP 102 Processing response.
ProfileConfigStore
A ConfigStore decorator that layers profile overlays over a delegate store's base config.
ProfileConfigStore.Builder
Builder class.
ProfileMerge
Merges a base configuration with one or more profile overlays into a single internal-INI string.
Progress
DTO for an HTML <progress> element.
Prompt
MCP prompt descriptor (prompts/list entry).
PromptArgument
Declared argument for an MCP prompt.
PromptCapability
Server capability flags for prompts.
PromptMessage
Single message line inside GetPromptResult.
Property<T,V>
A typed property descriptor that allows you to specify arbitrary consumers and producers corresponding to setters and getters.
Property.Builder<T,V>
Builder for constructing Property instances.
PropertyExtractor
Interface for custom property extraction strategies in the Bean-Centric Testing framework.
PropertyExtractors
Collection of standard property extractor implementations for the Bean-Centric Testing framework.
PropertyExtractors.ListPropertyExtractor
Property extractor for array and collection objects with numeric indexing and size access.
PropertyExtractors.MapPropertyExtractor
Property extractor for Map objects with direct key access and size property.
PropertyExtractors.ObjectPropertyExtractor
Standard JavaBean property extractor using reflection.
PropertyLookupResult
Tri-state result of a property lookup.
PropertyNamer
Defines an API for converting conventional bean property names to some other form.
PropertyNamer.Void
Represents a non-existent class.
PropertyNamerDLC
Converts property names to dashed-lower-case format.
PropertyNamerDUCS
Converts property names to dashed-upper-case-start format.
PropertyNamerULC
Converts property names to underscore-lower-case format.
PropertyNotFoundException
Exception thrown when a requested property cannot be found on an object.
PropertySource
Interface for pluggable property sources used by Settings.
PropertySourceProvider
Provider SPI for augmenting Settings with additional property sources.
PropertyStore
A writable extension of PropertySource that supports modifying property values.
PropertyValidator
Validates a bean-property value against a schema.
PropertyValidatorFactory
Builds PropertyValidator instances from a JSON-Schema-shaped map of constraints.
PropertyValidators
Discovery helper for PropertyValidatorFactory via ServiceLoader.
PropertyVar
Unified property variable resolver.
Protobuf
A pairing of a ProtobufSerializer and ProtobufParser into a single class with convenience read/write methods.
Prototext
A pairing of a PrototextSerializer and PrototextParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
Provider<T>
Lightweight provider interface equivalent to JSR-330 provider contracts.
ProxyAuthenticate
Represents a parsed Proxy-Authenticate HTTP response header.
ProxyAuthenticate
Represents an HTTP Proxy-Authenticate header.
ProxyAuthenticate.Builder
Fluent builder for assembling an HTTP Proxy-Authenticate challenge value.
ProxyAuthorization
Represents a parsed Proxy-Authorization HTTP request header.
ProxyAuthorization
Represents an HTTP Proxy-Authorization header.
ProxyAuthorization.Builder
Fluent builder for assembling an HTTP Proxy-Authorization credentials value.
Q
DTO for an HTML <q> element.
Qualifier
Meta-annotation used to declare qualifier annotations.
Query
REST request form-data annotation.
Queryable
Converter for enabling of search/view/sort/page support on response objects returned by a @RestOp-annotated method.
QueryArg
Resolves method parameters and parameter types annotated with Query on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
QueryMenuItem
Widget that returns a menu-item drop-down form for entering search/view/sort arguments.
RandomFunctions
Random / UUID functions for the #{...} script catalog.
RandomFunctions.Rand
#{rand()} — random double in [0.0, 1.0).
RandomFunctions.RandChoice
#{randChoice(option1, option2, ...)} — variadic.
RandomFunctions.RandInt
#{randInt(max)} — random int in [0, max).
RandomFunctions.RandLong
#{randLong(min, max)} — random long in [min, max] (inclusive both ends).
RandomFunctions.RandString
#{randString(length)} — random alphanumeric [A-Za-z0-9] string of length characters.
RandomFunctions.Uuid
#{uuid()} — random UUID via UUID.randomUUID().
Range
Represents a parsed Range HTTP request header.
Range
Represents an HTTP Range header.
Range.Builder
Fluent builder for assembling an HTTP Range header value.
RangeNotSatisfiable
Exception representing an HTTP 416 (Range Not Satisfiable).
RangeNotSatisfiable
Represents an HTTP 416 Range Not Satisfiable error response.
RateLimitGuard
Token-bucket RestGuard that throttles requests on a configurable per-request key.
RateLimitGuard.BucketState
Point-in-time view of a single token bucket as exposed by RateLimitGuard.Storage.snapshot().
RateLimitGuard.Builder
Builder for RateLimitGuard.
RateLimitGuard.RateLimitInfo
Snapshot of rate-limit state passed to the onLimitExceeded callback and used to populate advisory response headers.
RateLimitGuard.Storage
SPI for storing per-key token-bucket state.
RateLimitGuard.Storage.AcquireResult
Outcome of a tryAcquire attempt.
RawTemplateDispatcher
Engine-agnostic raw-template-dispatch contract shared by the view mixin resources and their standalone servlet companions.
Rb
DTO for an HTML <rb> element.
Rdf
Annotation for specifying options for RDF serializers.
RdfAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Rdf annotation.
RdfAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RdfApply
Dynamically applies a @Rdf annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
RdfApply.Array
A collection of @RdfApply annotations.
RdfApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RdfApply annotation.
RdfApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted RdfApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
RdfApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RdfBeanMeta
Metadata on beans specific to the RDF serializers and parsers pulled from the @Rdf annotation on the class.
RdfBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to the RDF serializers and parsers pulled from the @Rdf annotation on the bean property.
RdfClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to the RDF serializers and parsers pulled from the @Rdf annotation on the class.
RdfCollectionFormat
Used in conjunction with the @Rdf(collectionFormat) annotation to fine-tune how classes, beans, and bean properties are serialized, particularly collections.
RdfConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in XmlSerializer, XmlDocSerializer, and XmlParser.
RdfConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RdfConfig annotation.
RdfConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies RdfConfig annotations to a RdfParser.Builder.
RdfConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies RdfConfig annotations to a RdfSerializer.Builder.
RdfJson
A pairing of a RdfJsonSerializer and RdfJsonParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
RdfJsonParser
Subclass of RdfParser for parsing RDF/JSON into POJOs.
RdfJsonSerializer
Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/JSON notation.
RdfMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to RdfClassMeta, RdfBeanMeta, and RdfBeanPropertyMeta objects.
RdfNs
Namespace name/URL mapping pair.
RdfParser
Parses RDF into POJOs.
RdfParser.Builder<SELF extends RdfParser.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
RdfParser.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed RdfParser.create() / RdfParser.copy() path.
RdfParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of RdfParser.
RdfParserSession.Builder
Builder class.
RdfProto
A pairing of RdfProtoSerializer and RdfProtoParser for RDF/PROTO binary format.
RdfProtoParser
Stream-based RDF parser for RDF/PROTO binary format.
RdfProtoSerializer
Stream-based RDF serializer for RDF/PROTO binary format.
RdfSchema
Identifies the default RDF namespaces at the package level.
RdfSerializer
Serializes POJOs to RDF.
RdfSerializer.Builder<SELF extends RdfSerializer.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
RdfSerializer.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed RdfSerializer.create() / RdfSerializer.copy() path.
RdfSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of RdfSerializer.
RdfSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
RdfStreamParser
Stream-based RDF parser for binary formats (RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).
RdfStreamParser.Builder<SELF extends RdfStreamParser.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
RdfStreamParser.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed RdfStreamParser.create() / RdfStreamParser.copy() path.
RdfStreamParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of RdfStreamParser.
RdfStreamParserSession.Builder
Builder class.
RdfStreamSerializer
Stream-based RDF serializer for binary formats (RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).
RdfStreamSerializer.Builder<SELF extends RdfStreamSerializer.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
RdfStreamSerializer.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed RdfStreamSerializer.create() / RdfStreamSerializer.copy() path.
RdfStreamSerializerSession
Session for stream-based RDF serialization (binary formats like RDF/THRIFT, RDF/PROTO).
RdfStreamSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
RdfThrift
A pairing of RdfThriftSerializer and RdfThriftParser for RDF/THRIFT binary format.
RdfThriftParser
Stream-based RDF parser for RDF/THRIFT binary format.
RdfThriftSerializer
Stream-based RDF serializer for RDF/THRIFT binary format.
RdfUtils
Utility classes.
RdfXml
A pairing of a RdfXmlSerializer and RdfXmlParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
RdfXmlAbbrev
A pairing of a RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer and RdfXmlParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer
Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/XML-Abbrev (abbreviated XML notation).
RdfXmlParser
Subclass of RdfParser for parsing RDF/XML into POJOs.
RdfXmlSerializer
Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to RDF/XML (standard XML notation).
ReactiveResponseProcessor
Response processor that bridges Reactive Streams return values from @RestOp handlers to Juneau's response pipeline.
ReactiveStreamsAdapter
SPI that bridges a third-party reactive return type to one of the two JDK-native shapes that the ReactiveResponseProcessor understands: a CompletionStage (single value) or a Flow.Publisher (a stream of values).
ReactiveStreamsPublisherAdapter
Catch-all ReactiveStreamsAdapter for any Reactive-Streams org.reactivestreams.Publisher<T> that is not already handled by a more specific adapter.
ReactorReactiveAdapter
ReactiveStreamsAdapter for Project Reactor return types.
ReaderBody
A non-repeatable HttpBody that streams character content from a Reader, encoded as UTF-8.
ReaderEntity
A streamed, non-repeatable entity that obtains its content from an Reader.
ReaderInputStream
InputStream implementation that reads a character stream from a Reader and transforms it to a byte stream using a specified charset encoding.
ReaderParser
Subclass of Parser for characters-based parsers.
ReaderParser.Builder<SELF extends ReaderParser.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
ReaderParser.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed ReaderParser.create() / Parser.copy() path.
ReaderParserArg
Resolves method parameters of type ReaderParser on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
ReaderParserSession
Subclass of parser session objects for character-based parsers.
ReaderParserSession.Builder<SELF extends ReaderParserSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
ReaderParserSession.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
ReaderProcessor
Response processor for Reader objects.
ReaderResource
A streamed, non-repeatable resource that obtains its content from an Reader.
ReaderSwap
Transforms Readers to Strings.
ReadinessState
Shared, observable readiness flag consumed by HealthAggregator to gate the readiness probe.
ReadResourceRequest
Parameters for "resources/read".
ReadResourceResult
Result payload for "resources/read".
RecordAdapter
Static factories that produce buffered RecordReader / RecordWriter instances for formats whose token-stream surface is whole-value-only (no native TokenReader / TokenWriter).
RecordReadable
Capability role for objects that can open a whole-value RecordReader cursor.
RecordReader
Public low-level whole-value pull cursor over a Juneau-formatted document.
RecordReaderArg
Resolves method parameters of type RecordReader (or any subtype) on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
RecordStreamBody
Wrapper that lets a caller pass a Consumer<RecordWriter> or Consumer<TokenWriter> as the body of a @RemoteOp request.
RecordStreamBody
A streaming HTTP request body that emits its content through a token/record-streaming cursor.
RecordWritable
Capability role for objects that can open a whole-value RecordWriter cursor.
RecordWriter
Public low-level whole-value push generator over a Juneau-formatted document.
RecordWriterArg
Resolves method parameters of type RecordWriter (or any subtype) on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
RedocMixin
Mixin that publishes the Redoc HTML view at /redoc for the OpenAPI 3.1 spec.
RedocUI
Generates a Redoc-style documentation interface from an OpenAPI 3.1 document.
Referer
Represents a parsed Referer HTTP request header.
Referer
 
ReflectionMap<V>
Maps arbitrary values to classes, methods, fields, and constructors based on name-based patterns.
ReflectionMap.Builder<V>
Builder for creating ReflectionMap instances.
ReflectionUtils
Utility class providing convenient static methods for creating reflection info objects.
RegexFunctions
Regex functions for the #{...} script catalog.
RegexFunctions.Extract
#{extract(s, regex)} / #{extract(s, regex, group)} — replacement for the legacy $PE{...}.
RegexFunctions.Match
#{match(s, regex)} — replacement for the legacy $PM{...}.
RegexFunctions.ReplaceRegex
#{replaceRegex(s, regex, replacement)} — replacement for the legacy $PR{...}.
RelaxedPropertySource
