A PropertySource decorator that adds relaxed binding over a delegate source.
Remote
Identifies a proxy against a REST interface.
RemoteClient
Creates Java proxy instances for Remote-annotated interfaces, backed by an RestClient.
RemoteDelete
Annotation applied to Java methods on REST proxy interface classes.
RemoteGet
Annotation applied to Java methods on REST proxy interface classes.
RemoteMeta
Contains the meta-data about a REST proxy class.
RemoteMetadataException
Exceptions caused by invalid REST proxy classes.
RemoteOp
Annotation applied to Java methods on REST proxy interface classes.
RemoteOperationArg
Represents the metadata about an annotated argument of a method on a REST proxy class.
RemoteOperationBeanArg
Represents the metadata about an Request-annotated argument of a method on a REST proxy class.
RemoteOperationMeta
Contains the meta-data about a Java method on a REST proxy class.
RemoteOperationReturn
Represents the metadata about the returned object of a method on a remote proxy interface.
RemotePatch
Annotation applied to Java methods on REST proxy interface classes.
RemotePost
Annotation applied to Java methods on REST proxy interface classes.
RemotePut
Annotation applied to Java methods on REST proxy interface classes.
RemoteReturn
Possible values for the @RemoteOp(returns) annotation and the returns attribute on RemoteGet, RemotePost, RemotePut, RemotePatch, and RemoteDelete.
RemoteUtils
Utilities.
RemoveOp
The JSON Patch "remove" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.2.
ReplaceOp
The JSON Patch "replace" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.3.
Request
Request bean annotation.
RequestAttribute
Represents a single request attribute on an HTTP request.
RequestAttributes
Represents the attributes in an HTTP request.
RequestAttributeVar
Request attribute variable resolver.
RequestBeanArg
Resolves method parameters annotated with Request on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
RequestBeanMeta
Represents the metadata gathered from a parameter or class annotated with Request.
RequestBeanPropertyMeta
Represents the metadata gathered from a getter method of a class annotated with Request.
RequestBodyInfo
Describes a single request body.
RequestContent
Contains the content of the HTTP request.
RequestFormDataVar
Request form data variable resolver.
RequestFormParam
Represents a single form-data parameter on an HTTP request.
RequestFormParamList
Represents the parsed form-data parameters in an HTTP request.
RequestHeader
Represents a single header on an HTTP request.
RequestHeaderFieldsTooLarge
Exception representing an HTTP 431 (Request Header Fields Too Large).
RequestHeaderFieldsTooLarge
Represents an HTTP 431 Request Header Fields Too Large error response.
RequestHeaderList
Represents the headers in an HTTP request.
RequestHeaderVar
Request header variable resolver.
RequestHttpPart
Represents a single HTTP part on an HTTP request.
RequestIdFilter
Per-request id mint-or-honor filter that stashes the id on the servlet request and echoes it on the response.
RequestIdFilter.Builder
Builder for RequestIdFilter.
RequestPathParam
Represents a single path parameter on an HTTP request.
RequestPathParamList
Represents the path parameters in an HTTP request.
RequestPathVar
Request path variable resolver.
RequestQueryParam
Represents a single query parameter on an HTTP request.
RequestQueryParamList
Represents the query parameters in an HTTP request.
RequestQueryVar
Request query variable resolver.
RequestSwaggerVar
Rest info variable resolver.
RequestVar
Request attribute variable resolver.
ResetContent
Represents an HTTP 205 Reset Content response.
ResetContent
Represents an HTTP 205 Reset Content response.
ResolvingMarshalledMap
Subclass of a MarshalledMap that automatically resolves any SVL variables in values.
Resource
MCP resource descriptor (resources/list entry).
ResourceBundleUtils
Class-related utility methods.
ResourceCapability
Server capability flags for resources.
ResourceContents
Polymorphic MCP resource body (text or base64 blob).
ResourceDescription
Shortcut label for child resources.
ResourceDescriptions
A list of ResourceDescription objects.
ResourceSupplier
A supplier of a REST resource bean.
Response
Describes a single response from an API operation.
Response
REST response annotation.
ResponseAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Response annotation.
ResponseAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
ResponseAssertion
A fluent assertion class for validating RestResponse instances.
ResponseBeanArg
Resolves method parameters and parameter types annotated with Response on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
ResponseBeanMeta
Represents the metadata gathered from a parameter or class annotated with Response.
ResponseBeanProcessor
Response handler for @Response-annotated objects.
ResponseBeanPropertyMeta
Represents the metadata gathered from a getter method of a class annotated with Response.
ResponseBody
A fluent accessor for an HTTP response body returned by RestResponse.
ResponseBodyAssertion
A fluent assertion class for HTTP response bodies.
ResponseCodeArg
Resolves method parameters annotated with StatusCode on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
ResponseContent
Represents the body of an HTTP response.
ResponseHeader
Represents a single header on an HTTP response.
ResponseHeader
A fluent accessor for a named HTTP response header.
ResponseHeaderArg
Resolves method parameters annotated with Header of type Value representing response headers on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
ResponseHeaderAssertion
A fluent assertion class for a named HTTP response header.
ResponseInfo
Describes a single response from an API operation.
ResponsePartMeta
Represents the information needed to serialize a response part such as a response header or content.
ResponseProcessor
Defines the interface for processors that convert POJOs to appropriate HTTP responses.
ResponseProcessorList
A list of ResponseProcessor objects.
ResponseProcessorList.Builder
Builder class.
ResponseStatusLine
An implementation of StatusLine that adds assertions methods.
Rest
Used to denote that a class is a REST resource and to associate metadata on it.
RestAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Rest annotation.
RestAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestartCommand
Implements the 'restart' console command to gracefully shut down and restart the microservice.
RestAuthenticator
Resource-level authentication SPI for @Rest resources.
RestAuthenticator.Null
Sentinel "unset" type for @Rest(authenticator=...); never authenticates.
RestBuilder<SELF extends RestBuilder<SELF>>
Public, fluent, self-typed configuration surface for programmatically configuring a @Rest resource, child resource, or mixin instead of (or in addition to) the @Rest annotation.
RestCallException
Exception representing a 400+ HTTP response code against a remote resource or other exception.
RestCallException
Exception thrown when an HTTP call fails at the REST client level (e.g. unexpected status code, body deserialization failure, or interceptor rejection).
RestCallHandler
Interface that allows you to override the handling of HTTP requests.
RestCallInterceptor
Used to intercept http connection responses to allow modification of that response before processing and for listening for call lifecycle events.
RestCallInterceptor
Lifecycle interceptor for REST calls made by RestClient.
RestChildMatch
Represents a matched Rest-annotated child on an HTTP request.
RestChildren
Implements the child resources of a Rest-annotated class.
RestChildren.Builder
Builder class.
RestClient
Utility class for interfacing with remote REST interfaces.
RestClient
Next-generation transport-agnostic REST client.
RestClient.Builder<SELF extends RestClient.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
RestClient.Builder
Fluent builder for RestClient.
RestClient.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed RestClient.create() / RestClient.copy() path.
RestContext
Defines the initial configuration of a RestServlet or @Rest annotated object.
RestContext.Args
Bootstrap arguments for RestContext.
RestContext.ContextKind
The build-time kind of a RestContext — which of the three construction flavors produced it.
RestContext.ContextKind.Child
A routed child resource (mounted via @Rest(children)); isolated resolution.
RestContext.ContextKind.Mixin
A per-mixin sub-context (composed via Rest.mixins()/Rest.mixinDefs()); inherits the host chain.
RestContext.ContextKind.Root
A top-level (host) resource, mock context, or servlet-mounted resource.
RestContext.ResolvedMixin
The discovery-time normalized declaration of a single mixin.
RestContextArgs
Resolves method parameters on RestOp-annotated Java methods of types found on the RestContext object.
RestContextStats
A snapshot of execution statistics for REST resource classes.
RestConverter
REST method response converter.
RestConverterList
A list of RestConverter objects.
RestConverterList.Builder
Builder class.
RestDelete
Identifies a REST DELETE operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
RestDeleteAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RestDelete annotation.
RestDeleteAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestDestroy
Identifies a method that gets called during servlet destroy.
RestDestroyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RestDestroy annotation.
RestDestroyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestEndCall
Identifies a method that gets called right before we exit the servlet service method.
RestEndCallAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RestEndCall annotation.
RestEndCallAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestGet
Identifies a REST GET operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
RestGetAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RestGet annotation.
RestGetAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestGuard
REST method guard.
RestGuardList
A list of RestGuard objects.
RestGuardList.Builder
Builder class.
RestInit
Identifies a method that gets called during servlet initialization.
RestInitAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RestInit annotation.
RestInitAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestLogEntry
Structured log entry produced after every RestRequest.run() invocation.
RestLogEntry.Builder
Builder for RestLogEntry.
RestLogger
Pluggable logging interface for REST calls made by RestClient.
RestLogLevelResolver
Determines the System.Logger.Level for a RestLogEntry.
RestLogLevelResolver.RuleBuilder
Fluent builder for ordered predicate-based RestLogLevelResolver instances.
RestMatcher
Class used for defining method-level matchers using the @RestOp(matchers) annotation.
RestMatcherList
A list of RestMatcher objects.
RestMatcherList.Builder
Builder class.
RestMixin
Optional base class for @Rest mixin classes — the third sibling of RestServlet (servlet flavor) and RestResource (child-resource flavor), completing the servlet / resource / mixin naming triad.
RestMixin.Builder<R extends RestMixin,SELF extends RestMixin.Builder<R,SELF>>
Fluent builder for programmatically configuring a RestMixin subclass.
RestMixin.DefaultBuilder<R extends RestMixin>
Concrete default leaf builder returned by RestMixin.builder(Class) for the common (non-subclassed) case.
RestOp
Identifies a REST operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
RestOpAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RestOp annotation.
RestOpAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestOpArg
REST java method parameter resolver.
RestOpArgList
A list of RestOpArg classes.
RestOpArgList.Builder
Builder class.
RestOpContext
Represents a single Java servlet/resource method annotated with @RestOp.
RestOpContextArgs
Resolves method parameters on RestOp-annotated Java methods of types found on the RestOpContext object.
RestOperation
Aggregates the HTTP method, URL, and optional body into a single bean.
RestOperations
Encapsulates the set of RestOp-annotated methods within a single Rest-annotated object.
RestOperations.Builder
Builder class.
RestOpInvoker
A specialized invoker for methods that are called during a servlet request.
RestOpSession
A session for a single HTTP request.
RestOpSession.Builder
Builder class.
RestOpSessionArgs
Resolves method parameters on RestOp-annotated Java methods of types found on the RestOpSession object.
RestOptions
Identifies a REST OPTIONS operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
RestOptionsAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RestOptions annotation.
RestOptionsAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestPartType
Represents the possible parameter types as defined by the Swagger 2.0 specification.
RestPatch
Identifies a REST PATH operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
RestPatchAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RestPatch annotation.
RestPatchAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestPost
Identifies a REST POST operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
RestPostAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RestPost annotation.
RestPostAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestPostCall
Identifies a method that gets called immediately after the @RestOp annotated method gets called.
RestPostCallAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RestPostCall annotation.
RestPostCallAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestPostInit
Identifies a method that gets called immediately after servlet initialization.
RestPostInitAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RestPostInit annotation.
RestPostInitAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestPreCall
Identifies a method that gets called immediately before the @RestOp annotated method gets called.
RestPreCallAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RestPreCall annotation.
RestPreCallAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestPut
Identifies a REST PUT operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
RestPutAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RestPut annotation.
RestPutAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestRequest
Represents a request to a remote REST resource.
RestRequest
Fluent builder for a single HTTP request.
RestRequest
Represents an HTTP request for a REST resource.
RestRequest.DebugScope
Request-scoped debug controls.
RestRequestArgs
Resolves method parameters on RestOp-annotated Java methods of types found on the RestRequest object.
RestRequestCreated
Identify an HttpRequest that was created by a RestRequest.
RestRequestTextMapGetter
TextMapGetter implementation that reads HTTP request headers from a RestRequest.
RestResource
Identical to RestServlet but doesn't extend from HttpServlet.
RestResource.Builder<R extends RestResource,SELF extends RestResource.Builder<R,SELF>>
Fluent builder for programmatically configuring a RestResource subclass.
RestResource.DefaultBuilder<R extends RestResource>
Concrete default leaf builder returned by RestResource.builder(Class) for the common (non-subclassed) case.
RestResponse
Represents a response from a remote REST resource.
RestResponse
An HTTP response returned by RestRequest.run().
RestResponse
Represents an HTTP response for a REST resource.
RestResponseArgs
Resolves method parameters on RestOp-annotated Java methods of types found on the RestResponse object.
RestServerConstants
Static literals for juneau-rest-server: annotation attribute name constants used for allowlist inheritance checks and other module-internal logic.
RestServlet
Servlet implementation of a REST resource.
RestServlet.Builder<R extends RestServlet,SELF extends RestServlet.Builder<R,SELF>>
Fluent builder for programmatically configuring a RestServlet subclass.
RestServlet.DefaultBuilder<R extends RestServlet>
Concrete default leaf builder returned by RestServlet.builder(Class) for the common (non-subclassed) case, so callers are not forced to spell the SELF type parameter.
RestSession
Represents a single HTTP request.
RestSession.Builder
Builder class.
RestSessionArgs
Resolves method parameters on RestOp-annotated Java methods of types found on the RestSession object.
RestSharedConstants
Static constants shared across Juneau REST modules (for example juneau-rest-server, juneau-rest-client, and juneau-rest-mock) so wire names and other cross-tier strings stay aligned.
RestStartCall
Identifies a method that is called immediately after the HttpServlet.service(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) method is called.
RestStartCallAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @RestStartCall annotation.
RestStartCallAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
RestUtils
Various reusable utility methods.
ResultSetList
Transforms an SQL ResultSet into a list of maps.
RetryAfter
Represents a parsed Retry-After HTTP response header.
RetryAfter
Represents an HTTP Retry-After header.
ReversedList<E>
A reversed view of a list that does not modify the underlying list.
Role
Role for PromptMessage entries (MCP wire uses lowercase strings).
RoleBasedRestGuard
RestGuard that uses role expressions to determine whether an authenticated user has access to a class or method.
RoleMatcher
Utility class for matching JEE user roles against string expressions.
RootResources
Root router resource for the Jetty deployment.
RootResources
Root router resource for the Spring Boot deployment.
RootsCapability
Client roots capability.
RouteDescription
Describes a single route (an @RestOp-annotated method) in a route-index listing.
RouteDescriptions
A list of RouteDescription objects.
RouteIndexMixin
Mixin that exposes a content-negotiated index of all @RestOp-annotated methods on the host resource (and any other mixins on it) at /options (configurable).
Rp
DTO for an HTML <rp> element.
RrpcInterfaceMeta
Contains the meta-data about a remote proxy REST interface.
RrpcInterfaceMeta
Holds resolved metadata for an interface annotated with @Remote.
RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta
Contains the meta-data about a Java method on a remote class.
RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta
Holds resolved metadata for a single method on an interface annotated with Remote.
RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.ContentNegotiation
Method-level content negotiation: the accept and contentType media-type overrides sourced from @RemoteOp/verb-annotation members.
RrpcInterfaceMethodMeta.Policy
Method-level cross-cutting call policy: interceptors, per-call timeout, retries, and the generic throwOnError flag, sourced from @RemoteOp/verb annotation members.
RrpcRestOpContext
A specialized RestOpContext for handling "RRPC" HTTP methods.
RrpcRestOpSession
A session for a single HTTP request against an RRPC Java method.
RrpcRestOpSession.Builder
Builder class.
RrpcServlet
Abstract class for defining Remote Interface Services.
Rt
DTO for an HTML <rt> element.
Rtc
DTO for an HTML <rtc> element.
Ruby
DTO for an HTML <ruby> element.
RuntimeParseException
Unchecked wrapper used by the iterator(...) / stream(...) views to surface the checked IOException / ParseException cause through the Iterator / Stream API.
RxJavaReactiveAdapter
ReactiveStreamsAdapter for RxJava 3 return types.
S
DTO for an HTML <s> element.
SamlAssertionValidator
Validates a SAML 2.0 <samlp:Response> document and produces a ClaimsPrincipal marked with issuerType=SAML.
SamlAssertionValidator.Builder
Builder for SamlAssertionValidator.
SamlAuthFilter
AuthFilter that authenticates requests carrying a SAML 2.0 <samlp:Response> delivered via the SamlBinding.POST or SamlBinding.REDIRECT HTTP binding.
SamlAuthFilter.Builder
Builder for SamlAuthFilter.
SamlBinding
SAML 2.0 bindings supported by SamlAuthFilter for delivering a <Response> from an IdP to the SP.
SamlMetadataResolvers
Convenience factories for building MetadataResolver instances backed by an OpenSAML implementation.
Samp
DTO for an HTML <samp> element.
SampleRootResource
Sample root REST resource.
Schema
Swagger/OpenAPI/JSON Schema annotation.
Schema.Array
A collection of @Schema annotations.
SchemaAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Schema annotation.
SchemaAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
SchemaApply
Dynamically applies a @Schema annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
SchemaApply.Array
A collection of @SchemaApply annotations.
SchemaApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @SchemaApply annotation.
SchemaApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted SchemaApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
SchemaApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
SchemaInfo
Allows the definition of input and output data types.
SchemaInfo
Allows the definition of input and output data types.
SchemaUtils
Utilities for working with the schema annotations.
SchemaValidationException
Exception thrown when an HTTP part fails schema validation.
Scope
Lifecycle scope for a @TestBean-declared override.
Scope
Handle to one in-flight TracerHook-managed span.
Script
DTO for an HTML <script> element.
SearchArgs
Arguments passed to ObjectSearcher.
Section
DTO for an HTML <section> element.
Section
A single section in a config file.
SecurityRequirement
Lists the required security schemes for this operation.
SecurityScheme
Allows the definition of a security scheme that can be used by the operations.
SecuritySchemeInfo
Defines a security scheme that can be used by the operations.
SeeOther
Represents an HTTP 303 See Other response.
SeeOther
Represents an HTTP 303 See Other response.
SeeOtherRoot
Convenience subclass of SeeOther for redirecting a response to the servlet root.
Select
DTO for an HTML <select> element.
SeoMixin
Mixin that serves SEO-conventional endpoints /robots.txt and /sitemap.xml.
SeoMixin.Builder
Builder for SeoMixin instances.
SeoMixin.SitemapEntry
Single sitemap entry (immutable).
SerializedEntity
HttpEntity for serializing POJOs as the body of HTTP requests.
SerializedHeader
See Also:
SerializedPart
Subclass of NameValuePair for serializing POJOs as URL-encoded form post entries using the class.
SerializedPojoProcessor
Response handler for plain-old Java objects.
SerializedRequestAttrVar
Serialized request attribute variable resolver.
SerializeException
General exception thrown whenever an error occurs during serialization.
Serializer
Parent class for all Juneau serializers.
Serializer.Builder<SELF extends Serializer.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
Serializer.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed Serializer.create() / Serializer.copy() path.
Serializer.Null
Represents no Serializer.
SerializerBody
A repeatable HttpBody that serializes a POJO straight to the transport output stream.
SerializerConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in Serializer, OutputStreamSerializer, and WriterSerializer.
SerializerConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @SerializerConfig annotation.
SerializerConfigAnnotation.OutputStreamSerializerApply
Applies SerializerConfig annotations to a OutputStreamSerializer.Builder.
SerializerConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies SerializerConfig annotations to a Serializer.Builder.
SerializerConfigAnnotation.WriterSerializerApply
Applies SerializerConfig annotations to a WriterSerializer.Builder.
SerializerListener
Class for listening for serialize events during a serialization.
SerializerListener.Void
Represents no serializer listener.
SerializerMatch
Represents a serializer and media type that matches an HTTP Accept header value.
SerializerPipe
A wrapper around an object that a serializer sends its output to.
SerializerSession
Serializer session that lives for the duration of a single use of Serializer.
SerializerSession.Builder<SELF extends SerializerSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
SerializerSession.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
SerializerSet
Represents a group of Serializers that can be looked up by media type.
SerializerSet.Builder
Builder class.
SerializerSet.Inherit
An identifier that the previous entries in this group should be inherited.
SerializerSet.NoInherit
An identifier that the previous entries in this group should not be inherited.
SerializerWriter
Simple wrapper around a standard Writer with additional methods.
Server
An object representing a Server.
Server
Represents a parsed Server HTTP response header.
Server
Represents an HTTP Server header.
ServerCapabilities
MCP server capability advertisement in InitializeResult.
ServerVariable
The ServerVariable Object represents a server variable for server URL template substitution.
ServiceUnavailable
Exception representing an HTTP 503 (Service Unavailable).
ServiceUnavailable
Represents an HTTP 503 Service Unavailable error response.
ServletInitParamVar
Servlet init parameter variable resolver.
SessionStore
SPI for persisting OidcSession instances and resolving them back from a session-cookie value.
Sets<E>
A fluent builder for constructing Set instances with various configuration options.
Setting<T>
A memoizer that provides convenience methods for type conversion.
Settings
Encapsulates Java system properties with support for global and per-thread overrides for unit testing.
Settings.Builder
Builder for creating Settings instances.
ShortHolder
A simple mutable short value.
ShutdownResource
Provides the capability to shut down this REST microservice through a REST call.
SignedCookieSessionStore
Stateless SessionStore that serializes the session into an HMAC-signed compact JWT carried entirely in the session cookie.
SignedCookieSessionStore.Builder
Builder.
SimpleHtmlWriter
Utility class for creating custom HTML.
SimpleLock
A simple auto-closeable wrapper around a Lock that automatically acquires the lock when created and releases it when closed.
SimpleMap<K,V>
An unmodifiable, fixed-size map implementation backed by parallel key and value arrays.
SimplePartParser
An implementation of HttpPartParser that takes in the strings and tries to convert them to POJOs using constructors and static create methods.
SimplePartParser.Builder
Builder class.
SimplePartParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of SimplePartParser.
SimplePartSerializer
An implementation of HttpPartSerializer that simply serializes everything using Object.toString().
SimplePartSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
SimplePartSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of SimplePartSerializer.
SimpleReadWriteLock
An extension of ReentrantReadWriteLock with convenience methods for creating auto-closeable locks that work seamlessly with try-with-resources statements.
SimpleRestOperationArg
An implementation of a RestOpArg that takes in a ThrowingFunction for resolving a parameter value.
SimpleVar
Abstract superclass of all Simple Var Language variables that resolve to simple returned string values.
Singleton
Scope marker indicating one instance per BeanStore.
Sizer<T>
Functional interface for computing the size of objects in test assertions.
Small
DTO for an HTML <small> element.
Snapshot
Opaque handle for a single pushed overlay frame on a WritableBeanStore.
Snippet
A functional interface identical to Runnable but allows the Snippet.run() method to throw checked exceptions.
SoapXml
Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by SoapXmlSerializer}.
SoapXmlAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @SoapXml annotation.
SoapXmlAnnotation.Builder
 
SoapXmlApply
Dynamically applies a @SoapXml annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
SoapXmlApply.Array
 
SoapXmlApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @SoapXmlApply annotation.
SoapXmlApplyAnnotation.Applier
 
SoapXmlApplyAnnotation.Builder
 
SoapXmlBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to the SOAP/XML serializers and parsers pulled from the @SoapXml annotation on the bean property.
SoapXmlClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to the SOAP/XML serializers and parsers pulled from the @SoapXml annotation on the class.
SoapXmlConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in SoapXmlSerializer.
SoapXmlConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @SoapXmlConfig annotation.
SoapXmlConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies SoapXmlConfig annotations to a SoapXmlSerializer.Builder.
SoapXmlMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to SoapXmlClassMeta and SoapXmlBeanPropertyMeta objects.
SoapXmlSerializer
Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as XML+SOAP.
SoapXmlSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
SoapXmlSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of SoapXmlSerializer.
SoapXmlSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
SortArgs
Arguments passed to ObjectSorter.
SortedArrayList<E>
A sorted list implementation backed by an ArrayList.
SortedLinkedList<E>
A sorted list implementation backed by a LinkedList.
Source
Represents metadata from the source feed when an entry is copied from one feed to another.
Source
DTO for an HTML <source> element.
Span
DTO for an HTML <span> element.
Species
Pet species enumeration.
SpringBeanStore
A bean store that uses Spring bean resolution to find beans if they're not already in this store.
SpringEnvironmentPropertySource
Bridges a Spring Environment into the Juneau Settings singleton as a PropertySource.
SpringRestServlet
Subclass of a RestServlet that hooks into Spring Boot for using Spring Beans.
SqlStore
Example of a ConfigStore that uses a relational database as a backend.
SqlStore.Builder
Builder class.
Sse
Pairs SseSerializer and SseParser into a single class with convenience read/write methods for the text/event-stream wire format.
SseBroadcaster
In-memory server-side SSE broadcaster.
SseBroadcasterArg
Resolves SseBroadcaster method parameters.
SseEvent
Represents a single Server-Sent Event (SSE) frame on the wire.
SseEventReader
Line-driven Iterator over the events in a text/event-stream.
SseHeartbeat
Scheduled SSE heartbeat.
SseParser
Parses text/event-stream input (WHATWG Server-Sent Events) into Java objects.
SseParser.Builder
Builder class.
SseParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of SseParser.
SseParserSession.Builder
Builder class.
SseResponseSupport
Fluent SSE response helper.
SseSerializer
Serializes SseEvent objects to the text/event-stream wire format defined by the WHATWG Server-Sent Events spec.
SseSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
SseSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of SseSerializer.
SseSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
SseSubscription
Subscriber queue for an SseBroadcaster.
SseSubscriptionArg
Resolves SseSubscription method parameters.
StackOverlay
Stack-aware BeanStore overlay.
StackTraceElementSwap
Transforms StackTraceElements to String objects.
StateEnum
Enumeration of state machine states for use in parsing operations.
StaticFiles
API for retrieving localized static files from either the classpath or file system.
StaticFiles.Builder
Builder class.
StaticFiles.Void
Represents no static files
StaticFilesMixin
Mixin that serves static files from the active StaticFiles implementation under /static/* (configurable).
StaticFilesResource
Child-resource flavor of the static-files capability.
StaticFilesServlet
Standalone servlet companion of the StaticFilesMixin mixin.
StatsMixin
Mixin providing the residual [GET /stats] timing-statistics endpoint.
StatusCode
REST response status annotation.
StreamBody
A non-repeatable HttpBody that streams content from an InputStream.
StreamedVar
Abstract superclass of all Simple Var Language variables that write their values directly to a writer.
StreamEntity
A streamed, non-repeatable entity that obtains its content from an InputStream.
StreamingArrayRecord
O(1)-memory wrappers that adapt a fine-grained TokenReader / TokenWriter to the array-element record-stream contract.
StreamMarshaller
A subclass of Marshaller for stream-based serializers and parsers.
StreamResource
A streamed, non-repeatable resource that obtains its content from an InputStream.
StringAssertion
Used for assertion calls against string objects.
StringBody
An HttpBody backed by a UTF-8 string.
StringBuilderWriter
A Writer implementation that writes to a StringBuilder instead of a StringBuffer.
StringEntity
A self contained, repeatable entity that obtains its content from a String.
StringExpressionMatcher
Utility class for matching strings against string expressions.
StringFormat
Unified string formatter supporting both MessageFormat-style and printf-style formatting in the same pattern.
StringFormatSwap
Built-in object swap implementation class for the @MarshalledProp(format) annotation.
StringFunctions
String-manipulation functions for the #{...} script catalog.
StringFunctions.Concat
#{concat(s1, s2, ...)} — variadic string concatenation.
StringFunctions.Contains
#{contains(s, substr)} — returns "true" or "false".
StringFunctions.EndsWith
#{endsWith(s, suffix)} — returns "true" or "false".
StringFunctions.Format
#{format(pattern, args...)} — Java formatter-style formatting.
StringFunctions.Join
#{join(separator, parts...)} — concatenates parts with separator between each pair.
StringFunctions.Len
#{len(s)} / #{len(s, delimiter)} — replacement for the legacy $LN{...}.
StringFunctions.Lower
#{lower(s)} — replacement for the legacy $LC{...}.
StringFunctions.PathToken
#{pathToken(s)} — normalize a user-supplied path token for safe interpolation into a path= template.
StringFunctions.Repeat
#{repeat(s, n)} — repeats s n times.
StringFunctions.Replace
#{replace(s, target, replacement)} — literal (non-regex) string replacement.
StringFunctions.Reverse
#{reverse(s)} — reverses the characters of s.
StringFunctions.Split
#{split(s, separator)} — splits s on the literal separator substring.
StringFunctions.StartsWith
#{startsWith(s, prefix)} — returns "true" or "false".
StringFunctions.StripLeading
#{stripLeading(s)} — strips leading whitespace.
StringFunctions.StripSlashes
#{stripSlashes(s)} — strips leading and trailing / characters.
StringFunctions.StripTrailing
#{stripTrailing(s)} — strips trailing whitespace.
StringFunctions.Substring
#{substring(s, start)} / #{substring(s, start, end)} — replacement for the legacy $ST{...} SubstringVar.
StringFunctions.Trim
#{trim(s)} — strips leading and trailing whitespace.
StringFunctions.Upper
#{upper(s)} — replacement for the legacy $UC{...}.
StringHolder
A simple mutable string value.
Stringifier<T>
Functional interface for converting objects of a specific type to their string representation.
Stringifiers
Collection of standard stringifier implementations for the Bean-Centric Testing framework.
StringListAssertion
Used for assertion calls against lists of strings.
StringMatcherFactory
String matcher factory for the ObjectSearcher class.
StringRange
Represents a single value in a comma-delimited header value that optionally contains a quality metric for comparison and extension parameters.
StringRanges
A parsed Accept-Encoding or similar header value.
StringResource
A self contained, repeatable resource that obtains its content from a String.
StringSetting
A specialized Setting for string values that provides convenience methods for type conversion.
StringSwap<T>
Abstract subclass for object swaps that swap objects for strings.
StringUtils
Reusable string utility methods.
Strong
DTO for an HTML <strong> element.
StubBearerTokenValidator
Stub TokenValidator for the petstore demo — recognises an in-memory map of opaque bearer tokens.

DTO for an HTML <style> element.

Swagger

SwaggerElement

SwaggerProvider.Void

SwaggerResource
Wrapper bean for the resource class associated with a Swagger provider.

SwaggerUiMixin

SwaggerVar

Swap

Swapper<T>

Swappers
Collection of standard swapper implementations for the Bean-Centric Testing framework.
SwitchingProtocols
Represents an HTTP 101 Switching Protocols response.
SwitchingProtocols
Represents an HTTP 101 Switching Protocols response.
SystemEnvPropertySource
Property source backed by System.getenv(String).
SystemEnvPropertySourceProvider
Provider for SystemEnvPropertySource.
SystemPropertiesVar
System property variable resolver.
SystemPropertyPropertySource
Property source backed by System.getProperty(String).
SystemPropertyPropertySourceProvider
Provider for SystemPropertyPropertySource.
SystemUtils
System utilities.
Table
DTO for an HTML <table> element.
Tag
Allows adding metadata to a single tag that is used by the operation object.
Tag
Allows adding metadata to a single tag that is used by the Operation Object.
Tag
Swagger tag annotation.
TagAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Tag annotation.
TagAnnotation.Builder

Tbody
DTO for an HTML <tbody> element.
Td
DTO for an HTML <td> element.
TE
Represents a parsed TE HTTP request header.
TE
Represents an HTTP TE header.
Template
DTO for an HTML <template> element.
TemporalFormat
Supported wire formats for TemporalAccessor values.
TemporaryRedirect
Represents an HTTP 307 Temporary Redirect response.
TemporaryRedirect
Represents an HTTP 307 Temporary Redirect response.
TestBase
Base test class that provides common test configuration for all test classes in the junit package.
TestBean
Marks a field or method on a JUnit 5 test class as a test-time bean override.
TestBeanStore
Fluent BasicBeanStore subclass for declaring test-time bean overrides.
TestOp
The JSON Patch "test" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.6.
Text
Represents human-readable text in an Atom document.
Textarea
DTO for an HTML <textarea> element.
TextContent
MCP text content block.
TextResourceContents
Text body for resources/read results or embedded resource content.
Tfoot
DTO for an HTML <tfoot> element.
Th
DTO for an HTML <th> element.
Thead
DTO for an HTML <thead> element.
ThemeMenuItem
Widget that returns back a list of hyperlinks for rendering the contents of a page in the various default styles.
ThrowableAssertion<T extends Throwable>
Used for assertion calls against throwable objects.
ThrowableProcessor
Response handler for Throwable objects.
ThrowableUtils
Various utility methods for creating and working with throwables.
ThrowableUtils.SupplierWithThrowable<T>
Interface used with Utils.safeSupplier(SupplierWithThrowable).
ThrowingConsumer<T>
A functional interface representing an operation that accepts a single argument, returns no result, and may throw a checked exception.
ThrowingConsumer2<A,B>
A functional interface representing an operation that accepts two arguments, returns no result, and may throw a checked exception.
ThrowingConsumer3<A,B,C>
A functional interface representing an operation that accepts three arguments, returns no result, and may throw a checked exception.
ThrowingConsumer4<A,B,C,D>
A functional interface representing an operation that accepts four arguments, returns no result, and may throw a checked exception.
ThrowingConsumer5<A,B,C,D,E>
A functional interface representing an operation that accepts five arguments, returns no result, and may throw a checked exception.
ThrowingFunction<T,R>
A functional interface representing a function that accepts one argument, produces a result, and may throw a checked exception.
ThrowingFunction2<A,B,R>
A functional interface representing a function that accepts two arguments, produces a result, and may throw a checked exception.
ThrowingFunction3<A,B,C,R>
A functional interface representing a function that accepts three arguments, produces a result, and may throw a checked exception.
ThrowingFunction4<A,B,C,D,R>
A functional interface representing a function that accepts four arguments, produces a result, and may throw a checked exception.
ThrowingFunction5<A,B,C,D,E,R>
A functional interface representing a function that accepts five arguments, produces a result, and may throw a checked exception.
ThrowingSupplier<T>
A functional interface representing a supplier of results that may throw a checked exception.
Thrown
Represents a parsed Thrown HTTP response header.
Thrown
Represents an HTTP Thrown header.
Thrown.Part
Represents a single entry in this header.
ThrownStats
Represents an entry in ThrownStore.
ThrownStats.Builder
Builder class.
ThrownStore
An in-memory cache of thrown exceptions.
ThrownStore.Builder
Builder class.
ThymeleafDispatcher
Flavor-neutral worker bean carrying the Thymeleaf raw-template-dispatch logic shared by the ThymeleafMixin mixin, the ThymeleafServlet servlet, and the ThymeleafResource child flavors.
ThymeleafDispatcher.Builder
Builder for ThymeleafDispatcher.
ThymeleafMixin
Mixin that wires Thymeleaf view-rendering onto any Juneau REST resource.
ThymeleafMixin.Builder
Builder for ThymeleafMixin.
ThymeleafResource
Child-resource flavor of the ThymeleafMixin mixin.
ThymeleafServlet
Standalone servlet companion of the ThymeleafMixin mixin.
ThymeleafView
Immutable value class returned from @RestOp-annotated methods to ask the framework to render a Thymeleaf template.
ThymeleafViewRenderer
ResponseProcessor that detects ThymeleafView-typed return values and asks the configured TemplateEngine to render them directly onto the response writer.
Time
DTO for an HTML <time> element.
TimeMatcherFactory
Date/time matcher factory for the ObjectSearcher class.
TimeZoneFormat
Supported wire formats for TimeZone and ZoneId values.
Title
DTO for an HTML <title> element.
TokenCache
SPI for caching the result of an OAuth introspection or token-acquisition call.
TokenReadable
Capability role for parsers that additionally expose the structural TokenReader cursor (FULL formats: json, json5, jsonl, cbor, msgpack).
TokenReader
Public low-level pull-parser cursor over a Juneau-formatted document.
TokenReaderArg
Resolves method parameters of type TokenReader (or any subtype) on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
TokenType
Format-neutral token vocabulary for Juneau's low-level token-streaming API.
TokenValidator
SPI for verifying an opaque bearer token and producing the associated Principal.
TokenWritable
Capability role for serializers that additionally expose the structural TokenWriter cursor (FULL formats: json, json5, jsonl, cbor, msgpack, jsonschema, jcs).
TokenWriter
Public low-level push-generator that emits a Juneau-formatted document one structural event at a time.
TokenWriterArg
Resolves method parameters of type TokenWriter (or any subtype) on RestOp-annotated Java methods.
TomcatConfiguration
@Configuration class that wires embedded Tomcat into a Microservice bootstrap.
TomcatLogger
Implementation of the embedded-Tomcat Log façade based on Logger.
TomcatServerComponent
Drives the embedded Tomcat server lifecycle on behalf of the microservice via the MicroserviceListener fan-out.
TomcatServerFactory
Interface for creating embedded Tomcat servers.
TomcatSettings
Programmatic settings for the embedded Tomcat server contributed by TomcatConfiguration.
TomcatSettings.Builder
Builder for TomcatSettings.
Toml
TOML marshaller combining TomlSerializer and TomlParser.
TomlConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in TomlSerializer and TomlParser.
TomlConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @TomlConfig annotation.
TomlConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies TomlConfig annotations to a TomlParser.Builder.
TomlConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies TomlConfig annotations to a TomlSerializer.Builder.
TomlParser
Parses TOML v1.0.0 text into POJOs.
TomlParser.Builder
Builder for TomlParser.
TomlParserSession
Session for parsing TOML into POJOs.
TomlParserSession.Builder
Builder for TOML parser session.
TomlSerializer
Serializes POJOs to TOML v1.0.0 format.
TomlSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
TomlSerializerSession
Session for serializing objects to TOML format.
TomlSerializerSession.Builder
Builder for TOML serializer session.
TomlWriter
Specialized writer for serializing TOML v1.0.0.
Tool
MCP tool descriptor (tools/list entry).
ToolCapability
Server capability flags for tools.
Tooltip
Simple template for adding tooltips to HTML5 bean constructs, typically in menu item widgets.
TooManyRequests
Exception representing an HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests).
TooManyRequests
Represents an HTTP 429 Too Many Requests error response.
Tr
DTO for an HTML <tr> element.
TraceContext
Reflective accessor for the currently-active OpenTelemetry trace / span id, used by LogEntryFormatter to populate the optional {traceId} / {spanId} log fields.
TraceContextResponseProcessor
Writes the W3C Trace Context response headers (traceparent and, when present, tracestate) so a client calling this server can read the resulting trace identifiers back off the response.
TracerHook
SPI for receiving per-request tracing events from juneau-rest-server.
Track
DTO for an HTML <track> element.
Trailer
Represents a parsed Trailer HTTP response header.
Trailer
Represents an HTTP Trailer header.
TransferEncoding
Represents a parsed Transfer-Encoding HTTP response header.
TransferEncoding
Represents an HTTP Transfer-Encoding header.
TransportBody
The body of a transport-layer request — a thin wrapper around HttpBody that gives transports a stable contract without needing to know about higher-level body types.
TransportException
Thrown by HttpTransport.execute(TransportRequest) when a network-level error occurs (e.g. connection refused, timeout, SSL handshake failure).
TransportHeader
An HTTP header name/value pair as seen by the transport layer.
TransportRequest
A fully-resolved, transport-layer HTTP request.
TransportRequest.Builder
Fluent builder for TransportRequest.
TransportResponse
A transport-layer HTTP response.
TransportResponse.Builder
Fluent builder for TransportResponse.
Traversable
Converter for enabling path-addressing support on response objects returned by a @RestOp-annotated method.
TriG
A pairing of a TriGSerializer and TriGParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
TriGParser
Subclass of RdfParser for parsing TriG into POJOs.
TriGSerializer
Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to TriG format.
TriState
Three-state enumeration for boolean-like values that can be explicitly set or unset.
TriX
A pairing of a TriXSerializer and TriXParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
TriXParser
Subclass of RdfParser for parsing TriX (XML) into POJOs.
TriXSerializer
Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to TriX (XML) format.
Tuple1<A>
Represents an immutable tuple containing a single value.
Tuple2<A,B>
Represents an immutable tuple containing two values.
Tuple3<A,B,C>
Represents a simple tuple of 3 objects.
Tuple4<A,B,C,D>
Represents a simple tuple of 4 objects.
Tuple5<A,B,C,D,E>
Represents a simple tuple of 5 objects.
Turtle
A pairing of a TurtleSerializer and TurtleParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
TurtleParser
Subclass of RdfParser for parsing Turtle into POJOs.
TurtleSerializer
Subclass of RdfSerializer for serializing POJOs to Turtle format.
TypeCategory
Represents possible values for JSONSCHEMA_addExamplesTo and JSONSCHEMA_addDescriptionsTo.
TypeConversionFunctions
Type-conversion functions for the #{...} script catalog.
TypeConversionFunctions.ToBool
#{toBool(s)} — coerces s to boolean and renders as a String.
TypeConversionFunctions.ToDouble
#{toDouble(s)} — coerces s to double and renders as a String.
TypeConversionFunctions.ToInt
#{toInt(s)} — coerces s to int and renders as a String.
TypeConversionFunctions.ToLong
#{toLong(s)} — coerces s to long and renders as a String.
TypedFunction
Reflection-based base class for VarFunction implementations that prefer typed argument signatures over manual List<Object> unpacking.
TypeVariables
Encapsulates type variable implementations for a class hierarchy.
U
DTO for an HTML <u> element.
Ul
DTO for an HTML <ul> element.
Unauthorized
Exception representing an HTTP 401 (Unauthorized).
Unauthorized
Represents an HTTP 401 Unauthorized error response.
UnavailableForLegalReasons
Exception representing an HTTP 451 (Unavailable For Legal Reasons).
UnavailableForLegalReasons
Represents an HTTP 451 Unavailable For Legal Reasons error response.
UnprocessableEntity
Exception representing an HTTP 422 (Unprocessable Entity).
UnprocessableEntity
Represents an HTTP 422 Unprocessable Entity error response.
UnsupportedMediaType
Exception representing an HTTP 415 (Unsupported Media Type).
UnsupportedMediaType
Represents an HTTP 415 Unsupported Media Type error response.
Uon
A pairing of a UonSerializer and UonParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
Uon
Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by UonSerializer and UonParser.
UonAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Uon annotation.
UonAnnotation.Builder
 
UonApply
Dynamically applies a @Uon annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
UonApply.Array
 
UonApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @UonApply annotation.
UonApplyAnnotation.Applier
 
UonApplyAnnotation.Builder
 
UonBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to the UON serializers and parsers pulled from the @Uon annotation on the bean property.
UonClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to the UON serializers and parsers pulled from the @Uon annotation on the class.
UonComplexExample
UON complex example.
UonConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in UonSerializer and UonParser.
UonConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @UonConfig annotation.
UonConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies UonConfig annotations to a UonParser.Builder.
UonConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies UonConfig annotations to a UonSerializer.Builder.
UonExample
Sample class which shows the simple usage of UONSerializer.
UonMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to UonClassMeta and UonBeanPropertyMeta objects.
UonParser
Parses UON (a notation for URL-encoded query parameter values) text into POJO models.
UonParser.Builder<SELF extends UonParser.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
UonParser.Decoding
Default parser, decoding.
UonParser.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed UonParser.create() / UonParser.copy() path.
UonParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of UonParser.
UonParserSession.Builder<SELF extends UonParserSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
UonParserSession.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
UonReader
Same functionality as ParserReader except automatically decoded %xx escape sequences.
UonSerializer
Serializes POJO models to UON (a notation for URL-encoded query parameter values).
UonSerializer.Builder<SELF extends UonSerializer.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
UonSerializer.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed UonSerializer.create() / UonSerializer.copy() path.
UonSerializer.Encoding
Equivalent to UonSerializer.create().encoding().build();.
UonSerializer.Readable
Equivalent to UonSerializer.create().ws().build();.
UonSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of UonSerializer.
UonSerializerSession.Builder<SELF extends UonSerializerSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
UonSerializerSession.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
UonUtils
Utility methods for the UON and UrlEncoding serializers and parsers.
UonWriter
Specialized writer for serializing UON-encoded text.
Upgrade
Represents a parsed Upgrade HTTP request header.
Upgrade
 
UpgradeRequired
Exception representing an HTTP 426 (Upgrade Required).
UpgradeRequired
Represents an HTTP 426 Upgrade Required error response.
Uri
Used to identify a class or bean property as a URI.
UriAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Uri annotation.
UriAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
UriApply
Dynamically applies a @Uri annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
UriApply.Array
A collection of @UriApply annotations.
UriApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @UriApply annotation.
UriApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted UriApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
UriApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
UriContext
Represents a URL broken into authority/context-root/servlet-path/path-info parts.
UriRelativity
Identifies what relative URIs are relative to.
UriResolution
Identifies the possible types of URL resolution.
UriResolver
Class used to create absolute and root-relative URIs based on your current URI 'location' and rules about how to make such resolutions.
UriTooLong
Exception representing an HTTP 414 (URI Too Long).
UriTooLong
Represents an HTTP 414 URI Too Long error response.
Url
REST request dynamic-URL annotation.
UrlEncodedFormMatcher
Predefined matcher for matching requests with content type "application/x-www-form-urlencoded".
UrlEncodeVar
URL-encoding variable resolver.
UrlEncoding
A pairing of a UrlEncodingSerializer and UrlEncodingParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
UrlEncoding
Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by UrlEncodingSerializer and UrlEncodingParser.
UrlEncodingAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @UrlEncoding annotation.
UrlEncodingAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
UrlEncodingApply
Dynamically applies a @UrlEncoding annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
UrlEncodingApply.Array
A collection of @UrlEncodingApply annotations.
UrlEncodingApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @UrlEncodingApply annotation.
UrlEncodingApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted UrlEncodingApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
UrlEncodingApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
UrlEncodingBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to the URL-Encoding serializers and parsers pulled from the @UrlEncoding annotation on the bean property.
UrlEncodingClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to the URL-Encoding serializers and parsers pulled from the @UrlEncoding annotation on the class.
UrlEncodingConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in UrlEncodingSerializer and UrlEncodingParser.
UrlEncodingConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @UrlEncodingConfig annotation.
UrlEncodingConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies UrlEncodingConfig annotations to a UrlEncodingParser.Builder.
UrlEncodingConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies UrlEncodingConfig annotations to a UrlEncodingSerializer.Builder.
UrlEncodingMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to UrlEncodingClassMeta and UrlEncodingBeanPropertyMeta objects.
UrlEncodingParser
Parses URL-encoded text into POJO models.
UrlEncodingParser.Builder
Builder class.
UrlEncodingParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of UrlEncodingParser.
UrlEncodingParserSession.Builder
Builder class.
UrlEncodingSerializer
Serializes POJO models to URL-encoded notation with UON-encoded values (a notation for URL-encoded query paramter values).
UrlEncodingSerializer.Builder
Builder class.
UrlEncodingSerializer.Expanded
Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().expandedParams().build();.
UrlEncodingSerializer.PlainText
Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().plainTextParts().build();.
UrlEncodingSerializer.Readable
Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().useWhitespace().build();.
UrlEncodingSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of UrlEncodingSerializer.
UrlEncodingSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
UrlPath
Represents a parsed URL path-info string.
UrlPathMatch
Represents a URL path pattern match.
UrlPathMatcher
A parsed path pattern constructed from a @RestOp(path) value.
UrlPathMatcherList
A list of UrlPathMatcher objects.
UrlSwap
Transforms URL objects to and from Strings.
UrlVar
URL variable resolver.
UseProxy
Represents an HTTP 305 Use Proxy response.
UseProxy
Represents an HTTP 305 Use Proxy response.
User
User domain bean.
UserAgent
Represents a parsed User-Agent HTTP request header.
UserAgent
Represents an HTTP User-Agent header.
UserStatus
Lifecycle status of a User.
Utils
Common utility methods.
UuidFormat
Supported wire formats for UUID values.
ValidationException
Specialization of BadRequest thrown by BeanValidator when one or more Jakarta Bean Validation constraints on a @Content, @FormData, or @Request-bound parameter are violated.
ValidationViolation
Wire-friendly snapshot of a single Jakarta Bean Validation constraint violation, suitable for inclusion in an HTTP error response body.
Value
Resolves a configuration value into a constructor parameter, setter, or field.
ValueListener<T>
Listener interface for monitoring value changes in Holder objects.
ValueResolver
Internal helper used by the reflection layer to resolve @Value-annotated injection sites.
Var
DTO for an HTML <var> element.
Var
Abstract superclass of all Simple Var Language variables.
VarFunction
SPI for SVL #{...} script-evaluation functions.
VariantAlsoNegotiates
Exception representing an HTTP 506 (Variant Also Negotiate).
VariantAlsoNegotiates
Represents an HTTP 506 Variant Also Negotiates error response.
VarList
Simple list of variables that can consist of either variable classes or instances.
VarResolver
Utility class for resolving variables of the form "$X{key}" in strings.
VarResolver.Builder
Builder class.
VarResolverException
Exception that occurs during a var resolver session.
VarResolverSession
A var resolver session that combines a VarResolver with one or more session objects.
VarTemplate
A pre-compiled SVL template.
Vary
Represents a parsed Vary HTTP response header.
Vary
 
Verify
Utility class for performing simple validations on objects.
Version
Represents a version string such as "1.2" or "1.2.3"
VersionAssertion
Used for assertion calls against Version objects.
VersionMixin
Mixin that serves deployment-introspection metadata at /version (configurable).
VersionMixin.Builder
Builder for VersionMixin instances.
VersionProvider
Flavor-neutral version/build-metadata worker bean shared by the version @Rest flavors.
VersionProvider.Builder
Builder for VersionProvider instances.
VersionRange
Represents an OSGi-style version range like "1.2" or "[1.0,2.0)".
VersionResource
Child-resource flavor of the VersionMixin version/build-metadata capability.
VersionServlet
Standalone servlet companion of the VersionMixin mixin.
Via
Represents a parsed Via HTTP response header.
Via
 
Video
DTO for an HTML <video> element.
View
Engine-agnostic contract for a server-side-rendered template return value from an @RestOp-annotated method.
ViewArgs
Arguments passed to ObjectViewer.
ViewRenderer
Marker interface for response processors that handle View-typed return values.
ViewResource
Abstract base for the child-resource flavors of the view mixin resources.
ViewServlet
Abstract base for the standalone view-servlet companions of the view mixin resources.
Visibility
Defines class/field/method visibilities.
Warning
Represents a parsed Warning HTTP request/response header.
Warning
Represents an HTTP Warning header.
Warning.Builder
Fluent builder for assembling an HTTP Warning header value.
WatcherSensitivity
Determines how often the file system is polled by the watcher in FileStore.
Wbr
DTO for an HTML <wbr> element.
WeightedAverage
A simple weighted average of numbers.
WellKnownMixin
Mixin that serves RFC 8615 /.well-known/* discovery endpoints.
WellKnownMixin.Builder
Builder for WellKnownMixin instances.
Widget
Defines an interface for resolvers of "$W{...}"
WritableBeanStore
Extends BeanStore with methods for adding beans.
WriterSerializer
Subclass of Serializer for character-based serializers.
WriterSerializer.Builder<SELF extends WriterSerializer.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
WriterSerializer.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed WriterSerializer.create() / WriterSerializer.copy() path.
WriterSerializerSession
Subclass of SerializerSession for character-based serializers.
WriterSerializerSession.Builder<SELF extends WriterSerializerSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
WriterSerializerSession.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
WwwAuthenticate
Represents a parsed WWW-Authenticate HTTP response header.
WwwAuthenticate
Represents an HTTP WWW-Authenticate header.
WwwAuthenticate.Builder
Fluent builder for assembling an HTTP WWW-Authenticate challenge value.
Xml
A metadata object that allows for more fine-tuned XML model definitions.
Xml
A metadata object that allows for more fine-tuned XML model definitions.
Xml
A pairing of a XmlSerializer and XmlParser into a single class with convenience to/of methods.
Xml
Annotation for specifying various XML options for the XML and RDF/XML serializers.
XmlAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @Xml annotation.
XmlAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
XmlApply
Dynamically applies a @Xml annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
XmlApply.Array
A collection of @XmlApply annotations.
XmlApplyAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @XmlApply annotation.
XmlApplyAnnotation.Applier
Applies targeted XmlApply annotations to a Context.Builder.
XmlApplyAnnotation.Builder
Builder class.
XmlBeanMeta
Metadata on beans specific to the XML serializers and parsers pulled from the @Xml annotation on the class.
XmlBeanPropertyMeta
Metadata on bean properties specific to the XML serializers and parsers pulled from the @Xml annotation on the bean property.
XmlClassMeta
Metadata on classes specific to the XML serializers and parsers pulled from the @Xml annotation on the class.
XmlComplexExample
Sample class which shows the complex usage of XmlSerializer.
XmlConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in XmlSerializer, XmlDocSerializer, and XmlParser.
XmlConfigAnnotation
Utility classes and methods for the @XmlConfig annotation.
XmlConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
Applies XmlConfig annotations to a XmlParser.Builder.
XmlConfigAnnotation.SerializerApply
Applies XmlConfig annotations to a XmlSerializer.Builder.
XmlConfigurationExample
Xml configuration example.
XmlDocSerializer
Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as XML.
XmlDocSerializer.Ns
Default serializer without namespaces.
XmlDocSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of XmlDocSerializer.
XmlDocSerializerSession.Builder
Builder class.
XmlEventAllocator
XMLEventAllocator base class.
XmlEventAllocator.Void
Represents the absence of this class.
XmlFormat
XML format to use when serializing a POJO.
XmlMetaProvider
Interface for providing access to XmlClassMeta, XmlBeanMeta, and XmlBeanPropertyMeta objects.
XmlNs
Namespace name/URL mapping pair.
XmlParser
Parses text generated by the XmlSerializer class back into a POJO model.
XmlParser.Builder<SELF extends XmlParser.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
XmlParser.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed XmlParser.create() / XmlParser.copy() path.
XmlParserSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of XmlParser.
XmlParserSession.Builder<SELF extends XmlParserSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
XmlParserSession.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
XmlReader
Wrapper class around a XMLStreamReader.
XmlReporter
XMLReporter base class.
XmlReporter.Void
Represents the absence of this class.
XmlResolver
XMLResolver base class.
XmlResolver.Void
Represents the absence of this class.
XmlSchema
Identifies the default XML namespaces at the package level.
XmlSerializer
Serializes POJO models to XML.
XmlSerializer.Builder<SELF extends XmlSerializer.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
XmlSerializer.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed XmlSerializer.create() / XmlSerializer.copy() path.
XmlSerializer.Ns
Default serializer without namespaces.
XmlSerializer.NsSq
Default serializer without namespaces, single quotes.
XmlSerializer.NsSqReadable
Default serializer without namespaces, single quotes, with whitespace.
XmlSerializer.Sq
Default serializer, single quotes.
XmlSerializer.SqReadable
Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added.
XmlSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of XmlSerializer.
XmlSerializerSession.Builder<SELF extends XmlSerializerSession.Builder<SELF>>
Builder class.
XmlSerializerSession.ContentResult
Identifies what the contents were of a serialized bean.
XmlSerializerSession.DefaultBuilder
Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
XmlSimpleExample
Sample class which shows the simple usage of XmlSerializer.
XmlTestUtils
Shared test-support utilities for validating XML output.
XmlUtils
XML utility methods.
XmlWriter
Specialized writer for serializing XML.
XorEncodeMod
Simply XOR+Base64 encoder for obscuring passwords and other sensitive data in INI config files.
XVar
Dummy variable for resolving $X{...} variables.

Builder class.
YamlSerializer.Readable
Default serializer, with whitespace.
YamlSerializerSession
Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of YamlSerializer.
